    Module mathcomp.classical.classical_sets

    From HB Require Import structures.
    From mathcomp Require Import all_ssreflect_compat ssralg matrix finmap ssrnum.
    From mathcomp Require Import ssrint rat interval.
    #[warning="-warn-library-file-internal-analysis"]
    From mathcomp Require Import unstable.
    From mathcomp Require Import mathcomp_extra boolp wochoice.

    # Set Theory This file develops a basic theory of sets and types equipped with a canonical inhabitant (pointed types). Thanks to this basic set theory, we proved Zorn's Lemma, which states that any ordered set such that every totally ordered subset admits an upper bound has a maximal element. We also proved an analogous version for preorders, where maximal is replaced with premaximal: $t$ is premaximal if whenever $t < s$ we also have $s < t$. About the naming conventions in this file: - use T, T', T1, T2, etc., aT (domain type), rT (return type) for names of variables in Type (or choiceType/pointedType/porderType) + use the same suffix or prefix for the sets as their containing type (e.g., A1 in T1, etc.) + as a consequence functions are rather of type aT -> rT - use I, J when the type corresponds to an index - sets are named A, B, C, D, etc., or Y when it is ostensibly an image set (i.e., of type set rT) - indexed sets are rather named F Examples of notations: | Rocq notatons | | Meaning | |-----------------------------:|---|:------------------------------------ | set0 |==| $\emptyset$ | [set: A] |==| the full set of elements of type A | `` `\|` `` |==| $\cup$ | `` `&` `` |==| $\cap$ | `` `\` `` |==| set difference | `` `+` `` |==| symmetric difference | `` ~` `` |==| set complement | `` `<=` `` |==| $\subseteq$ | `` f @` A `` |==| image by f of A | `` f @^-1` A `` |==| preimage by f of A | [set x] |==| the singleton set $\{x\}$ | [set~ x] |==| the complement of $\{x\}$ | [set E \| x in P] |==| the set of E with x ranging in P | range f |==| image by f of the full set | \big[setU/set0]_(i <- s \| P i) f i |==| finite union | \bigcup_(k in P) F k |==| arbitrary union | \bigcap_(k in P) F k |==| arbitrary intersection | trivIset D F |==| F is a sequence of pairwise disjoint | | | sets indexed over the domain D Detailed documentation: ## Sets ``` set T == type of sets on T (x \in P) == boolean membership predicate from ssrbool for set P, available thanks to a canonical predType T structure on sets on T [set x : T | P] == set of points x : T such that P holds [set x | P] == same as before with T left implicit [set E | x in A] == set defined by the expression E for x in set A [set E | x in A & y in B] == same as before for E depending on 2 variables x and y in sets A and B setT == full set set0 == empty set range f == the range of f, i.e., [set f x | x in setT] [set a] == set containing only a [set a : T] == same as before with the type of a made explicit A `|` B == union of A and B a |` A == A extended with a [set a1; a2; ..; an] == set containing only the n elements ai A `&` B == intersection of A and B A `*` B == product of A and B, i.e., set of pairs (a,b) such that A a and B b A.`1 == set of points a such that there exists b so that A (a, b) A.`2 == set of points a such that there exists b so that A (b, a) ~` A == complement of A [set~ a] == complement of [set a] A `\` B == complement of B in A A `\ a == A deprived of a `I_n := [set k | k < n] \bigcup_(i in P) F == union of the elements of the family F whose index satisfies P \bigcup_(i : T) F == union of the family F indexed on T \bigcup_(i < n) F := \bigcup_(i in `I_n) F \bigcup_(i >= n) F := \bigcup_(i in [set i | i >= n]) F \bigcup_i F == same as before with T left implicit \bigcap_(i in P) F == intersection of the elements of the family F whose index satisfies P \bigcap_(i : T) F == union of the family F indexed on T \bigcap_(i < n) F := \bigcap_(i in `I_n) F \bigcap_(i >= n) F := \bigcap_(i in [set i | i >= n]) F \bigcap_i F == same as before with T left implicit ``` ### About sets of sets ``` set_system T := set (set T) setI_closed G == the set of sets G is closed under finite intersection setU_closed G == the set of sets G is closed under finite union rectangle X Y := [set U `*` V | U in X & V in Y] preimage_set_system D f G == set system of the preimages by f of sets in G image_set_system D f G == set system of the sets with a preimage by f in G cross f g X Y := preimage_set_system setT f X `|` preimage_set_system setT g Y X `x` Y := cross fst snd X Y ``` ``` R ^nat == notation for the type of sequences, i.e., functions of type nat -> R bigcup2 A B == the sequence A, B, 0, 0, ... bigcup2 A B == the sequence A, B, T, T, ... smallest C G := \bigcap_(A in [set M | C M /\ G `<=` M]) A A `<=` B <-> A is included in B A `<` B := A `<=` B /\ ~ (B `<=` A) A `<=>` B <-> double inclusion A `<=` B and B `<=` A f @^-1` A == preimage of A by f f @` A == image of A by f This is a notation for `image A f` A !=set0 := exists x, A x [set` p] == a classical set corresponding to the predType p `[a, b] := [set` `[a, b]], i.e., a classical set corresponding to the interval `[a, b] `]a, b] := [set` `]a, b]] `[a, b[ := [set` `[a, b[] `]a, b[ := [set` `]a, b[] `]-oo, b] := [set` `]-oo, b]] `]-oo, b[ := [set` `]-oo, b[] `[a, +oo[ := [set` `[a, +oo[] `]a, +oo[ := [set` `]a, +oo[] `]-oo, +oo[ := [set` `]-oo, +oo[] is_subset1 A <-> A contains only 1 element is_fun f <-> for each a, f a contains only 1 element is_total f <-> for each a, f a is non empty is_totalfun f <-> conjunction of is_fun and is_total xget x0 P == point x in P if it exists, x0 otherwise; P must be a set on a choiceType fun_of_rel f0 f == function that maps x to an element of f x if there is one, to f0 x otherwise F `#` G <-> intersections beween elements of F an G are all non empty seqDU F := sequence F_0, F_1\F_0, F_2\(F_0 U F_1),... seqD F == the sequence F_0, F_1 \ F_0, F_2 \ F_1,... ``` ## Pointed types ``` pointedType == interface type for types equipped with a canonical inhabitant The HB class is Pointed. point == canonical inhabitant of a pointedType get P == point x in P if it exists, point otherwise P must be a set on a pointedType. ``` ## squash/unsquash ``` $| T | == the type `T : Type` is inhabited $| T | has type `Prop`. $| T | is a notation for `squashed T`. squash x == object of type $| T | (with x : T) unsquash s == extract an inhabitant of type `T` (with s : $| T |) ``` Tactic: - squash x: solves a goal $| T | by instantiating with x or [the T of x] ## Pairwise-disjoint sets ``` trivIset D F == the sets F i, where i ranges over D : set I, are pairwise-disjoint cover D F := \bigcup_(i in D) F i partition D F A == the non-empty sets F i,where i ranges over D : set I, form a partition of A pblock_index D F x == index i such that i \in D and x \in F i pblock D F x := F (pblock_index D F x) maximal_disjoint_subcollection F A B == A is a maximal (for inclusion) disjoint subcollection of the collection B of elements in F : I -> set T ``` ## Upper and lower bounds ``` ubound A == the set of upper bounds of the set A lbound A == the set of lower bounds of the set A ``` Predicates to express existence conditions of supremum and infimum of sets of real numbers: ``` has_ubound A := ubound A != set0 has_sup A := A != set0 /\ has_ubound A has_lbound A := lbound A != set0 has_inf A := A != set0 /\ has_lbound A isLub A m := m is a least upper bound of the set A supremums A := set of supremums of the set A supremum x0 A == supremum of A or x0 if A is empty infimums A := set of infimums of the set A infimum x0 A == infimum of A or x0 if A is empty F `#` G := the classes of sets F and G intersect ``` ## Sections ``` xsection A x == with A : set (T1 * T2) and x : T1 is the x-section of A ysection A y == with A : set (T1 * T2) and y : T2 is the y-section of A ``` ## Relations Notations for composition and inverse (scope: relation_scope): ``` B \; A == [set x | exists z, A (x.1, z) & B (z, x.2)] A^-1 == [set xy | A (xy.2, xy.1)] ```

    Unset SsrOldRewriteGoalsOrder.
    Set Implicit Arguments.
    Unset Strict Implicit.
    Unset Printing Implicit Defensive.

    Declare Scope classical_set_scope.

    Reserved Notation "R ^nat".
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' x : T | P ]" (only parsing).
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' x | P ]" (format "[ 'set' x | P ]").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' E | x 'in' A ]"
      (format "[ '[hv' 'set' E '/ ' | x 'in' A ] ']'").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' E | x 'in' A & y 'in' B ]"
      (format "[ '[hv' 'set' E '/ ' | x 'in' A & y 'in' B ] ']'").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' a ]" (format "[ 'set' a ]").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' : T ]" (format "[ 'set' : T ]").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' a : T ]" (format "[ 'set' a : T ]").
    Reserved Notation "A `|` B" (at level 52, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "a |` A" (at level 52, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `&` B" (at level 48, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `*` B" (at level 46, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `*`` B" (at level 46, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A ``*` B" (at level 46, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A .`1" (format "A .`1").
    Reserved Notation "A .`2" (format "A .`2").
    Reserved Notation "~` A" (at level 35, right associativity).
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set' ~ a ]" (format "[ 'set' ~ a ]").
    Reserved Notation "A `\` B" (at level 50, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `\ b" (at level 50, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `+` B" (at level 54, left associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `<` B" (at level 70, no associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `<=` B" (at level 70, no associativity).
    Reserved Notation "A `<=>` B" (at level 70, no associativity).
    Reserved Notation "f @^-1` A" (at level 24).
    Reserved Notation "f @` A" (at level 24).
    Reserved Notation "A !=set0" (at level 80).
    Reserved Notation "[ 'set`' p ]" (format "[ 'set`' p ]").
    Reserved Notation "[ 'disjoint' A & B ]"
      (format "'[hv' [ 'disjoint' '/ ' A '/' & B ] ']'").
    Reserved Notation "F `#` G"
      (at level 48, left associativity, format "F `#` G").
    Reserved Notation "'`I_' n" (at level 8, n at level 2, format "'`I_' n").
    Reserved Notation "A `x` B" (at level 46, left associativity).

    Build_ProperFilter_ex : forall {T : Type} [F : set_system T], (forall P : set T, F P -> exists x : T, P x) -> Filter F -> ProperFilter F Build_ProperFilter_ex is not universe polymorphic Arguments Build_ProperFilter_ex {T}%_type_scope [F] filter_ex%_function_scope FF Build_ProperFilter_ex is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.filter.Build_ProperFilter_ex Declared in library mathcomp.classical.filter, line 536, characters 11-32

    Definition

    near_simpl : (forall (U : Type) (T : filteredType U) (x : T) (P : set U), (\forall x0 \near nbhs x, P x0) = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (U : Type) (T : filteredType U) (x : T) (P : set U), nbhs x P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (X : Type) (fX : filteredType X) (x : fX) (P : set X), nbhs x P = (\near x, P x)) * (forall (T : Type) (F : filter_on T) (P : set T), (\near F, P F) = (\forall x \near F, P x)) * (forall (T U : Type) (f : T -> U) (F : set_system T) (P : set U), (\forall y \near (f x @[x --> F])%classic, P y) = (\near F, P (f F))) * (forall (T U : Type) (f : T -> set U) (F : set_system T) (P : set U), (\forall y \near (f x `@[x --> F])%classic, P y) = (\near F, exists y : U, f F y /\ P y)) * (forall (T T' U U' : Type) (f : T -> U) (g : T' -> U') (F : set_system T) (G : set_system T') (P : U -> set U'), Filter F -> Filter G -> (\forall y \near (f x @[x --> F])%classic & y' \near (g x @[x --> G])%classic, P y y') = (\near F & G, P (f F) (g G))) near_simpl is not universe polymorphic near_simpl is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.filter.NearMap.near_simpl Declared in library mathcomp.classical.filter, line 1128, characters 11-21

    subsetP
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : {subset A <= B} <-> (A `<=` B).

    range

    Notation
    "[ 'set' a ]"
    Source code
     := (set1 a) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'set' a : T ]"
    Source code
     := [set (a : T)] : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'set' : T ]"
    Source code
     := (@setT T) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `|` B"
    Source code
     := (setU A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "a |` A"
    Source code
     := ([set a] `|` A) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'set' a1 ; a2 ; .. ; an ]"
    Source code
     :=
      (setU .. (a1 |` [set a2]) .. [set an]) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `&` B"
    Source code
     := (setI A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `*` B"
    Source code
     := (setX A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A .`1"
    Source code
     := (fst_set A) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A .`2"
    Source code
     := (snd_set A) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `*`` B"
    Source code
     := (setXR A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A ``*` B"
    Source code
     := (setXL A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "~` A"
    Source code
     := (setC A) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'set' ~ a ]"
    Source code
     := (~` [set a]) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `\` B"
    Source code
     := (setD A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `\ a"
    Source code
     := (A `\` [set a]) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'disjoint' A & B ]"
    Source code
     := (disj_set A B) : classical_set_scope.

    Notation
    "A `<=` B"
    Source code
     := (subset A B) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A `<` B"
    Source code
     := (proper A B) : classical_set_scope.

    Notation
    "A `<=>` B"
    Source code
     := ((A `<=` B) /\ (B `<=` A)) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "f @^-1` A"
    Source code
     := (preimage f A) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "f @` A"
    Source code
     := (image A f) (only parsing) : classical_set_scope.
    Notation
    "A !=set0"
    Source code
     := (nonempty A) : classical_set_scope.

     | is_true (x \in p)] : classical_set_scope.

    Notation
    "`[ a , b ]"

    Source code
     :=
      [set` Interval (BRight a) (BLeft b)] : classical_set_scope.

    Source code

    Source code

    Source code

    Notation
    "`] -oo , '+oo' ["
    Source code
     :=
      [set` Interval -oo%O +oo%O] : classical_set_scope.

    Lemma
    nat_nonempty
    Source code
     : [set: nat] !=set0
    Proof.
    by exists 1%N. Qed.

    #[global] Hint Resolve nat_nonempty : core.

    Lemma
    in_set1
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : eqType} (
    a
    Source code
     : T) (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : x \in [set a] = (x == a).
    Proof.
    by apply/(sameP _ idP)/(equivP idP); rewrite inE eq_opE. Qed.

    Lemma
    pred_oappE
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    D
    Source code
     : {pred T}) :
      pred_oapp D = mem (some @` D)%classic.
    Proof.
    apply/funext=> -[x|]/=; apply/idP/idP; rewrite /pred_oapp/= inE //=.
    - by move=> xD; exists x.
    - by move=> [// + + [<-]].
    - by case.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    pred_oapp_set
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : Type} (
    D
    Source code
     : set T) :
      pred_oapp (mem D) = mem (some @` D)%classic.
    Proof.
    by rewrite pred_oappE; apply/funext => x/=; apply/idP/idP; rewrite ?inE;
       move=> [y/= ]; rewrite ?in_setE; exists y; rewrite ?in_setE.
    Qed.

    Section basic_lemmas.
    Context {

    Source code
     : Type}.
    Implicit Types A B C D : set T.

    Source code

    A

     : set T) (

    Lemma
    notin_setE
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T)
    x
    Source code

    Lemma
    setTPn
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : A != setT <-> exists
    t
    Source code
    , ~ A t.
    Proof.
    split => [/negP|[t]]; last by apply: contra_notP => /negP/negPn/eqP ->.
    apply: contra_notP => /forallNP h.
    by apply/eqP; rewrite predeqE => t; split => // _; apply: contrapT.
    Qed.
    #[deprecated(note="Use setTPn instead")]
    Notation
    setTP
    Source code
     := setTPn (only parsing).

    Lemma
    in_set0
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : (x \in set0) = false
    Proof.
    by rewrite memNset. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setT
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : x \in setT
    Proof.
    by rewrite mem_set. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setC
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T)
    A
    Source code
     : (x \in ~` A) = (x \notin A).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/idP; rewrite inE notin_setE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setI
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T)
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (x \in A `&` B) = (x \in A) && (x \in B).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/andP; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setD
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T)
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (x \in A `\` B) = (x \in A) && (x \notin B).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/andP; rewrite !inE notin_setE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setU
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T)
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (x \in A `|` B) = (x \in A) || (x \in B).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/orP; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setX
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T * T')
    A
    Source code
    E
    Source code
     : (x \in A `*` E) = (x.1 \in A) && (x.2 \in E).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/andP; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_valP
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    } (
    x
    Source code
     : A) : A (val x).
    Proof.
    by apply: set_mem; apply: valP. Qed.

    Lemma
    eqEsubset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A = B) = (A `<=>` B).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split => [->|[AB BA]]; [by split|].
    by rewrite predeqE => t; split=> [/AB|/BA].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    seteqP
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A = B) <-> (A `<=>` B)
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_true
    Source code
     : [set` predT] = setT :> set T.
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_false
    Source code
     : [set` pred0] = set0 :> set T.
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_predC
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : {pred T}) : [set` predC P] = ~` [set` P].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => t /negP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_andb
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
     : {pred T}) : [set` predI P Q] = [set` P] `&` [set` Q].
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => x; split; rewrite /= inE => /andP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_orb
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
     : {pred T}) : [set` predU P Q] = [set` P] `|` [set` Q].
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => x; split; rewrite /= inE => /orP. Qed.

    Lemma
    fun_true
    Source code
     : (fun=> true) = setT :> set T.
    Proof.
    by rewrite [LHS]set_true. Qed.

    Lemma
    fun_false
    Source code
     : (fun=> false) = set0 :> set T.
    Proof.
    by rewrite [LHS]set_false. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_mem_set
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : [set` A] = A.
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split=> x/=; rewrite inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    mem_setE
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : pred T) : mem [set` P] = mem P.
    Proof.
    by congr Mem; apply/funext=> x; apply/asboolP/idP. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_refl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `<=` A
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_trans
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> B `<=` C -> A `<=` C.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB sBC ? ?; apply/sBC/sAB. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub0set
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : set0 `<=` A
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    properW
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<` B -> A `<=` B
    Proof.
    by case. Qed.

    Lemma
    properxx
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~ A `<` A
    Proof.
    by move=> [?]; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    setC0
    Source code
     : ~` set0 = setT :> set T.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE; split => ?. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCK
    Source code
     : involutive (@setC T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite funeqE => t; rewrite /setC; exact: notLR. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCT
    Source code
     : ~` setT = set0 :> set T
    Proof.
    by rewrite -setC0 setCK. Qed.

    Definition
    setC_inj
    Source code
     := can_inj setCK.

    Lemma
    setIC
    Source code
     : commutative (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[]|[]]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIS
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> C `&` A `<=` C `&` B.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB t [Ct At]; split => //; exact: sAB. Qed.

    Lemma
    setSI
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `&` C `<=` B `&` C.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB; rewrite -!(setIC C); apply setIS. Qed.

    Lemma
    setISS
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     : A `<=` C -> B `<=` D -> A `&` B `<=` C `&` D.
    Proof.
    by move=> /(@setSI B) /subset_trans sAC /(@setIS C) /sAC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIT
    Source code
     : right_id setT (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[]|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setTI
    Source code
     : left_id setT (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[]|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setI0
    Source code
     : right_zero set0 (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[]|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0I
    Source code
     : left_zero set0 (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite setIC setI0. Qed.

    Lemma
    setICl
    Source code
     : left_inverse set0 setC (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => ?; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setICr
    Source code
     : right_inverse set0 setC (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite setIC setICl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIA
    Source code
     : associative (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[? []]|[[]]]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setICA
    Source code
     : left_commutative (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite setIA [A `&` _]setIC -setIA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIAC
    Source code
     : right_commutative (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite setIC setICA setIA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIACA
    Source code
     : @interchange (set T) setI setI.
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C D; rewrite -setIA [B `&` _]setICA setIA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIid
    Source code
     : idempotent_op (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> [[]|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIIl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `&` B `&` C = (A `&` C) `&` (B `&` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIA !(setIAC _ C) -(setIA _ C) setIid. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIIr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `&` (B `&` C) = (A `&` B) `&` (A `&` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !(setIC A) setIIl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUC
    Source code
     : commutative (@setU T).
    Proof.
    move=> p q; rewrite /setU/mkset predeqE => a; tauto. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUS
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> C `|` A `<=` C `|` B.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB t [Ct|At]; [left|right; exact: sAB]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setSU
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `|` C `<=` B `|` C.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB; rewrite -!(setUC C); apply setUS. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUSS
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     : A `<=` C -> B `<=` D -> A `|` B `<=` C `|` D.
    Proof.
    by move=> /(@setSU B) /subset_trans sAC /(@setUS C) /sAC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setTU
    Source code
     : left_zero setT (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => t; split; [case|left]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUT
    Source code
     : right_zero setT (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => t; split; [case|right]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0U
    Source code
     : left_id set0 (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => t; split; [case|right]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setU0
    Source code
     : right_id set0 (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite predeqE => t; split; [case|left]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUCl
    Source code
     : left_inverse setT setC (@setU T).
    Proof.
    move=> A.
    by rewrite predeqE => t; split => // _; case: (pselect (A t)); [right|left].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setUCr
    Source code
     : right_inverse setT setC (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite setUC setUCl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUA
    Source code
     : associative (@setU T).
    Proof.
    move=> p q r; rewrite /setU/mkset predeqE => a; tauto. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUCA
    Source code
     : left_commutative (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite setUA [A `|` _]setUC -setUA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUAC
    Source code
     : right_commutative (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite setUC setUCA setUA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUACA
    Source code
     : @interchange (set T) setU setU.
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C D; rewrite -setUA [B `|` _]setUCA setUA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUid
    Source code
     : idempotent_op (@setU T).
    Proof.
    move=> p; rewrite /setU/mkset predeqE => a; tauto. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUUl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `|` B `|` C = (A `|` C) `|` (B `|` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUA !(setUAC _ C) -(setUA _ C) setUid. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUUr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `|` (B `|` C) = (A `|` B) `|` (A `|` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !(setUC A) setUUl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setU_id2r
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     :
      (forall
    x
    Source code
    , (~` B) x -> A x = C x) -> (A `|` B) = (C `|` B).
    Proof.
    move=> h; apply/seteqP; split => [x [Ax|Bx]|x [Cx|Bx]]; [|by right| |by right].
    - by have [|/h {}h] := pselect (B x); [by right|left; rewrite -h].
    - by have [|/h {}h] := pselect (B x); [by right|left; rewrite h].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDE
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `\` B = A `&` ~` B
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUDl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (A `\` B) `|` C = (A `|` C) `\` (B `\` C).
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split => x /=; first tauto.
    #[warnings="-deprecated-syntactic-definition"] by move=> [[a|c]]; rewrite not_andE notE; tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setUDr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `|` (B `\` C) = (A `|` B) `\` (C `\` A).
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUC setUDl setUC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDUK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `|` (B `\` A) = B.
    Proof.
    move=> AB; apply/seteqP; split=> [x [/AB//|[//]]|x Bx].
    by have [Ax|nAx] := pselect (A x); [left|right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDKU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> (B `\` A) `|` A = B.
    Proof.
    by move=> /setDUK; rewrite setUC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> B `<=` C -> C `\` A = (C `\` B) `|` (B `\` A).
    Proof.
    move=> AB BC; apply/seteqP; split.
      move=> x [Cx Ax].
      by have [Bx|Bx] := pselect (B x); [right|left].
    move=> x [[Cx Bx]|[Bx Ax]].
    - by split => // /AB.
    - by split => //; exact/BC.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDv
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `\` A = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => t; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUv
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `|` ~` A = setT.
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => x; split=> //= _; apply: lem. Qed.

    Lemma
    setvU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~` A `|` A = setT
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUC setUv. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUCK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `|` B) `|` ~` B = setT.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -setUA setUv setUT. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUKC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `|` (A `|` B) = setT.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUA setvU setTU. Qed.

    Lemma
    setICK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `&` B) `&` ~` B = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -setIA setICr setI0. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIKC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `&` (A `&` B) = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIA setICl set0I. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDIK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` (B `\` A) = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE setICA -setDE setDv setI0. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDKI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (B `\` A) `&` A = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIC setDIK. Qed.

    Lemma
    setD1K
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A a -> a |` A `\ a = A.
    Proof.
    by move=> Aa; rewrite setDUK//= => x ->. Qed.

    Lemma
    setI1
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : A `&` [set a] = if a \in A then [set a] else set0.
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => b; case: ifPn; rewrite (inE, notin_setE) => Aa;
       split=> [[]|]//; [move=> -> //|move=> /[swap] -> /Aa].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set1I
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : [set a] `&` A = if a \in A then [set a] else set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIC setI1. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : (A `<=` set0) = (A = set0).
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset propeqE; split=> [A0|[]//]; split. Qed.

    Lemma
    subTset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : (setT `<=` A) = (A = setT).
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset propeqE; split=> [|[]]. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub1set
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ([set x] `<=` A) = (x \in A).
    Proof.
    by apply/propext; split=> [|/[!inE] xA _ ->//]; rewrite inE; exact. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetT
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `<=` setT
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetW
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : A = B -> A `<=` B
    Proof.
    by move->. Qed.

    Definition
    subsetCW
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : A = B -> B `<=` A := subsetW \o esym.

    Lemma
    disj_set2E
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : [disjoint A & B] = (A `&` B == set0).
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_set2P
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (A `&` B = set0) [disjoint A & B]%classic.
    Proof.
    exact/eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_setPS
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (A `&` B `<=` set0) [disjoint A & B]%classic.
    Proof.
    by rewrite subset0; apply: disj_set2P. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_set_sym
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : [disjoint B & A] = [disjoint A & B].
    Proof.
    by rewrite !disj_set2E setIC. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_setPCl
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (A `<=` B) [disjoint A & ~` B]%classic.
    Proof.
    apply: (iffP disj_setPS) => [P t ?|P t [/P//]].
    by apply: contrapT => ?; apply: (P t).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_setPCr
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (A `<=` B) [disjoint ~` B & A]%classic.
    Proof.
    by rewrite disj_set_sym; apply: disj_setPCl. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_setPLR
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (A `<=` ~` B) [disjoint A & B]%classic.
    Proof.
    by apply: (equivP idP); rewrite (rwP disj_setPCl) setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_setPRL
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    } : reflect (B `<=` ~` A) [disjoint A & B]%classic.
    Proof.
    by apply: (equivP idP); rewrite (rwP disj_setPCr) setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsets_disjoint
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B <-> A `&` ~` B = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite (rwP disj_setPCl) (rwP eqP). Qed.

    Lemma
    disjoints_subset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B = set0 <-> A `<=` ~` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite subsets_disjoint setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetC1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : (A `<=` [set~ x]) = (x \in ~` A).
    Proof.
    rewrite !inE; apply/propext; split; first by move/[apply]; apply.
    by move=> NAx y; apply: contraPnot => ->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setSD
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `\` C `<=` B `\` C.
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE; apply: setSI. Qed.

    Lemma
    setTD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : setT `\` A = ~` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => t; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0P
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : (A != set0) <-> (A !=set0).
    Proof.
    split=> [/negP A_neq0|[t tA]]; last by apply/negP => /eqP A0; rewrite A0 in tA.
    apply: contrapT => /asboolPn/forallp_asboolPn A0; apply/A_neq0/eqP.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    nonemptyPn
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~ (A !=set0) <-> A = set0.
    Proof.
    by split; [|move=> ->]; move/set0P/negP; [move/negbNE/eqP|]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setF_eq0
    Source code
     : (T -> False) -> all_equal_to (set0 : set T).
    Proof.
    by move=> TF A; rewrite -subset0 => x; have := TF x. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_nonempty
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A !=set0 -> B !=set0.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB [x Ax]; exists x; apply: sAB. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> ~` B `<=` ~` A.
    Proof.
    by move=> sAB ? nBa ?; apply/nBa/sAB. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetCl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `<=` B -> ~` B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /subsetC; rewrite setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetCr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` ~` B -> B `<=` ~` A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /subsetC; rewrite setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetC2
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `<=` ~` B -> B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /subsetC; rewrite !setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetCP
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `<=` ~` B <-> B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by split=> /subsetC; rewrite ?setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetCPl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` A `<=` B <-> ~` B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by split=> /subsetC; rewrite ?setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetCPr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` ~` B <-> B `<=` ~` A.
    Proof.
    by split=> /subsetC; rewrite ?setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetUl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` A `|` B
    Proof.
    by move=> x; left. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetUr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : B `<=` A `|` B
    Proof.
    by move=> x; right. Qed.

    Lemma
    subUset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (B `|` C `<=` A) = ((B `<=` A) /\ (C `<=` A)).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split => [|[BA CA] x]; last by case; [exact: BA | exact: CA].
    by move=> sBC_A; split=> x ?; apply sBC_A; [left | right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setIidPl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B = A <-> A `<=` B.
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE; split=> [AB t /AB [] //|AB t].
    by split=> [[]//|At]; split=> //; exact: AB.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setIidPr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B = B <-> B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIC setIidPl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIidl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `&` B = A
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIidPl. Qed.
    Lemma
    setIidr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : B `<=` A -> A `&` B = B
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIidPr. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUidPl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `|` B = A <-> B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    split=> [<- ? ?|BA]; first by right.
    rewrite predeqE => t; split=> [[//|/BA//]|?]; by left.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setUidPr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `|` B = B <-> A `<=` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUC setUidPl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUidl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : B `<=` A -> A `|` B = A
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUidPl. Qed.
    Lemma
    setUidr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> A `|` B = B
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUidPr. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (A `<=` B `&` C) = ((A `<=` B) /\ (A `<=` C)).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split=> [H|[y z ??]]; split; by [move=> ?/H[]|apply y|apply z].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDidPl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `\` B = A <-> A `&` B = set0.
    Proof.
    rewrite setDE disjoints_subset predeqE; split => [AB t|AB t].
    by rewrite -AB => -[].
    by split=> [[]//|At]; move: (AB t At).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDidl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B = set0 -> A `\` B = A.
    Proof.
    by move=> /setDidPl. Qed.

    Lemma
    subIset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `<=` C \/ B `<=` C -> A `&` B `<=` C.
    Proof.
    case=> sub a; by [move=> [/sub] | move=> [_ /sub]]. Qed.

    Lemma
    subIsetl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B `<=` A
    Proof.
    by move=> x []. Qed.

    Lemma
    subIsetr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B `<=` B
    Proof.
    by move=> x []. Qed.

    Lemma
    subDsetl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `\` B `<=` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE; apply: subIsetl. Qed.

    Lemma
    subDsetr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `\` B `<=` ~` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE; apply: subIsetr. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetI_neq0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     :
      A `<=` B -> C `<=` D -> A `&` C !=set0 -> B `&` D !=set0.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB CD [x [/AB Bx /CD Dx]]; exists x. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetI_eq0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     :
      A `<=` B -> C `<=` D -> B `&` D = set0 -> A `&` C = set0.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB /(subsetI_neq0 AB); rewrite -!set0P => /contra_eq. Qed.

    Lemma
    setD_eq0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `\` B = set0) = (A `<=` B).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split=> [ADB0 a|sAB].
      by apply: contraPP => nBa xA; rewrite -[False]/(set0 a) -ADB0.
    by rewrite predeqE => ?; split=> // - [?]; apply; apply: sAB.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    properEneq
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `<` B) = (A != B /\ A `<=` B).
    Proof.
    rewrite /proper andC propeqE; split => [[BA AB]|[/eqP]].
      by split => //; apply/negP; apply: contra_not BA => /eqP ->.
    by rewrite eqEsubset => AB BA; split => //; exact: contra_not AB.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    nonsubset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~ (A `<=` B) -> A `&` ~` B !=set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -setD_eq0 setDE -set0P => /eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    setU_eq0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `|` B = set0) = ((A = set0) /\ (B = set0)).
    Proof.
    by rewrite -!subset0 subUset. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCS
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (~` A `<=` ~` B) = (B `<=` A).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split => [|BA].
      by move/subsets_disjoint; rewrite setCK setIC => /subsets_disjoint.
    by apply/subsets_disjoint; rewrite setCK setIC; apply/subsets_disjoint.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setDT
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `\` setT = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE setCT setI0. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0D
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : set0 `\` A = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE set0I. Qed.

    Lemma
    setD0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `\` set0 = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE setC0 setIT. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDS
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> C `\` B `<=` C `\` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE -setCS; apply: setIS. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDSS
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     : A `<=` C -> D `<=` B -> A `\` B `<=` C `\` D.
    Proof.
    by move=> /(@setSD B) /subset_trans sAC /(@setDS C) /sAC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~`(A `|` B) = ~` A `&` ~` B.
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => z.
    by apply: asbool_eq_equiv; rewrite asbool_and !asbool_neg asbool_or negb_or.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setCI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` (A `&` B) = ~` A `|` ~` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -[in LHS](setCK A) -[in LHS](setCK B) -setCU setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : ~` (A `\` B) = ~` A `|` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setDE setCI setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDUr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `\` (B `|` C) = (A `\` B) `&` (A `\` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE setCU setIIr. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIUl
    Source code
     : left_distributive (@setI T) (@setU T).
    Proof.
    move=> A B C; rewrite predeqE => t; split.
      by move=> [[At|Bt] Ct]; [left|right].
    by move=> [[At Ct]|[Bt Ct]]; split => //; [left|right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setIUr
    Source code
     : right_distributive (@setI T) (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite ![A `&` _]setIC setIUl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUIl
    Source code
     : left_distributive (@setU T) (@setI T).
    Proof.
    move=> A B C; rewrite predeqE => t; split.
      by move=> [[At Bt]|Ct]; split; by [left|right].
    by move=> [[At|Ct] [Bt|Ct']]; by [left|right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setUIr
    Source code
     : right_distributive (@setU T) (@setI T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite ![A `|` _]setUC setUIl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `|` B) `&` A = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t []//|t ?]; split => //; left. Qed.

    Lemma
    setKU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` (B `|` A) = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t []//|t ?]; split => //; right. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `&` B) `|` A = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t [[]//|//]|t At]; right. Qed.

    Lemma
    setKI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `|` (B `&` A) = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t [//|[]//]|t At]; left. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDUl
    Source code
     : left_distributive setD (@setU T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite !setDE setIUl. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUKD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B `<=` set0 -> (A `|` B) `\` A = B.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB0; rewrite setDUl setDv set0U setDidl// -subset0 setIC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUDK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `&` B `<=` set0 -> (B `|` A) `\` A = B.
    Proof.
    by move=> *; rewrite setUC setUKD. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIDA
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `&` (B `\` C) = (A `&` B) `\` C.
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE setIA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setIDAC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (A `\` B) `&` C = A `&` (C `\` B).
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIC !setIDA setIC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `\` (A `\` B) = A `&` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite 2!setDE setCI setCK setIUr setICr set0U. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDDl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (A `\` B) `\` C = A `\` (B `|` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE setCU setIA. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDDr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `\` (B `\` C) = (A `\` B) `|` (A `&` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE setCI setIUr setCK. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDIr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : A `\` B `&` C = (A `\` B) `|` (A `\` C).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !setDE setCI setIUr. Qed.

    Lemma
    setUIDK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `&` B) `|` A `\` B = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUC -setDDr setDv setD0. Qed.

    Lemma
    setDUD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     : (A `|` B) `\` C = A `\` C `|` B `\` C.
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split=> [x [[Ax|Bx] Cx]|x [[Ax]|[Bx] Cx]].
    - by left.
    - by right.
    - by split=> //; left.
    - by split=> //; right.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setX0
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : A `*` set0 = set0 :> set (T * T').
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => -[t u]; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0X
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T') : set0 `*` A = set0 :> set (T * T').
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => -[t u]; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setXTT
    Source code
    T'
    Source code
     : setT `*` setT = setT :> set (T * T').
    Proof.
    exact/predeqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    setXT
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set T1) : A `*` @setT T2 = fst @^-1` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => -[x y]; split => //= -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setTX
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    B
    Source code
     : set T2) : @setT T1 `*` B = snd @^-1` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => -[x y]; split => //= -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setXI
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    X1
    Source code
     : set T1) (
    X2
    Source code
     : set T2) (
    Y1
    Source code
     : set T1) (
    Y2
    Source code
     : set T2) :
      (X1 `&` Y1) `*` (X2 `&` Y2) = X1 `*` X2 `&` Y1 `*` Y2.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => -[x y]; split=> [[[? ?] [*]//]|[] [? ?] [*]]. Qed.

    Lemma
    setSX
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    C
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     : set T1) (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T2) :
      A `<=` B -> C `<=` D -> C `*` A `<=` D `*` B.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB CD x [] /CD Dx1 /AB Bx2. Qed.

    Lemma
    setX_bigcupr
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T2) (
    P
    Source code
     : set I) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T1) :
      A `*` \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (A `*` F i).
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => -[x y]; split; first by move=> [/= Ax [n Pn Fny]]; exists n.
    by move=> [n Pn [/= Ax Fny]]; split => //; exists n.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setX_bigcupl
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T2) (
    P
    Source code
     : set I) (
    A
    Source code
     : set T1) :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i `*` A = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (F i `*` A).
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => -[x y]; split; first by move=> [[n Pn Fnx] Ax]; exists n.
    by move=> [n Pn [/= Ax Fny]]; split => //; exists n.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcupX1l
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    A1
    Source code
     : set T1) (
    A2
    Source code
     : T1 -> set T2) :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in A1) ([set i] `*` A2 i) = A1 `*`` A2.
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => -[i j]; split=> [[? ? [/= -> //]]|[]]; exists i. Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcupX1r
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    A1
    Source code
     : T2 -> set T1) (
    A2
    Source code
     : set T2) :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in A2) (A1 i `*` [set i]) = A1 ``*` A2.
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => -[i j]; split=> [[? ? [? /= -> //]]|[]]; exists j. Qed.

    Lemma
    setY0
    Source code
     : right_id set0 (@setY T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite /setY setD0 set0D setU0. Qed.

    Lemma
    set0Y
    Source code
     : left_id set0 (@setY T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A; rewrite /setY set0D setD0 set0U. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYK
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `+` A = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /setY setDv setU0. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYC
    Source code
     : commutative (@setY T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B; rewrite /setY setUC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYTC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `+` [set: T] = ~` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /setY setDT set0U setTD. Qed.

    Lemma
    setTYC
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : [set: T] `+` A = ~` A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setYC setYTC. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYA
    Source code
     : associative (@setY T).
    Proof.
    move=> A B C; rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=;
    by have [|] := pselect (A x); have [|] := pselect (B x);
      have [|] := pselect (C x); tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setIYl
    Source code
     : left_distributive (@setI T) (@setY T).
    Proof.
    move=> A B C; rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=;
    by have [|] := pselect (A x); have [|] := pselect (B x);
      have [|] := pselect (C x); tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setIYr
    Source code
     : right_distributive (@setI T) (@setY T).
    Proof.
    by move=> A B C; rewrite setIC setIYl -2!(setIC A). Qed.

    Lemma
    setY_def
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `+` B = (A `\` B) `|` (B `\` A).
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYE
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `+` B = (A `|` B) `\` (A `&` B).
    Proof.
    rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=;
    by have [|] := pselect (A x); have [|] := pselect (B x); tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setYU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `+` B) `+` (A `&` B) = A `|` B.
    Proof.
    rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=;
    by have [|] := pselect (A x); have [|] := pselect (B x); tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setYI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `|` B) `\` (A `+` B) = A `&` B.
    Proof.
    rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=;
    by have [|] := pselect (A x); have [|] := pselect (B x); tauto.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setYD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `+` (A `&` B) = A `\` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /setY; apply/seteqP; split => x/=; tauto. Qed.

    Lemma
    setYCT
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `+` ~` A = [set: T].
    Proof.
    by rewrite /setY setDE setCK setIid setDE setIid setUv. Qed.

    Lemma
    setCYT
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~` A `+` A = [set: T].
    Proof.
    by rewrite setYC setYCT. Qed.

    Lemma
    not_setD1
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~ A a -> A `\ a = A.
    Proof.
    by move=> NDr; apply/setDidPl/disjoints_subset/subsetCr => _ ->. Qed.

    End basic_lemmas.
    Arguments subsetT {T} A.

    #[global]
    Hint Resolve subsetUl subsetUr subIsetl subIsetr subDsetl subDsetr : core.
    Arguments setU_id2r {T} C {A B}.

    Lemma
    set_cst
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    } (
    x
    Source code
     : T) (
    A
    Source code
     : set I) :
      [set x | _ in A] = if A == set0 then set0 else [set x].
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split=> [_ [i +] <-|t]; first by case: ifPn => // /eqP ->.
    by case: ifPn => // /set0P[i Ai ->{t}]; exists i.
    Qed.

    Section set_order.
    Import Order.TTheory.

    Lemma
    set_eq_le
    Source code
    d
    Source code
     (
    rT
    Source code
     : porderType d)
    T
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : T -> rT) :
      [set
    x
    Source code
     | f x = g x] = [set
    x
    Source code
     | (f x <= g x)%O] `&` [set
    x
    Source code
     | (f x >= g x)%O].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => [x/= ->//|x /andP]; rewrite -eq_le =>/eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_neq_lt
    Source code
    d
    Source code
     (
    rT
    Source code
     : orderType d)
    T
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
    g
    Source code
     : T -> rT) :
      [set
    x
    Source code
     | f x != g x ] = [set
    x
    Source code
     | (f x < g x)%O] `|` [set
    x
    Source code
     | (f x > g x)%O].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => [x/=|x /=]; rewrite neq_lt => /orP. Qed.

    End set_order.

    Lemma
    image2E
    Source code
     {
    TA
    Source code
    TB
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type} (
    A
    Source code
     : set TA) (
    B
    Source code
     : set TB) (
    f
    Source code
     : TA -> TB -> rT) :
      [set f x y |
    x
    Source code
     in A &
    y
    Source code
     in B] = uncurry f @` (A `*` B).
    Proof.
    apply/predeqP => x; split=> [[a ? [b ? <-]]|[[a b] [? ? <-]]]/=;
    by [exists (a, b) | exists a => //; exists b].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set_nil
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : eqType) : [set` [::]] = @set0 T.
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_cons1
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : eqType) (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : [set` [:: x]] = [set x].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => y /=; rewrite ?inE => /eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_seq_eq0
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : eqType) (
    S
    Source code
     : seq T) : ([set` S] == set0) = (S == [::]).
    Proof.
    apply/eqP/eqP=> [|->]; rewrite predeqE //; case: S => // h t /(_ h).
    by rewrite /= mem_head => -[/(_ erefl)].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fset_eq0
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    S
    Source code
     : {fset T}) :
      ([set` S] == set0) = (S == fset0).
    Proof.
    by rewrite set_seq_eq0. Qed.

    Section InitialSegment.

    Lemma
    II0
    Source code
     : `I_0 = set0
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE. Qed.

    Lemma
    II1
    Source code
     : `I_1 = [set 0]
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE; case. Qed.

    Lemma
    IIn_eq0
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_n = set0 -> n = 0.
    Proof.
    by case: n => // n; rewrite predeqE; case/(_ 0%N); case. Qed.

    Lemma
    IIS
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_n.+1 = `I_n `|` [set n].
    Proof.
    rewrite /mkset predeqE => i; split => [|[|->//]].
    by rewrite ltnS leq_eqVlt => /orP[/eqP ->|]; by [left|right].
    by move/ltn_trans; apply.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    IISl
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_n.+1 = n |` `I_n.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setUC IIS. Qed.

    Lemma
    IIDn
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_n.+1 `\ n = `I_n.
    Proof.
    by rewrite IIS setUDK// => x [->/=]; rewrite ltnn. Qed.

    Lemma
    setI_II
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_m `&` `I_n = `I_(minn m n).
    Proof.
    by case: leqP => mn; [rewrite setIidl// | rewrite setIidr//]
       => k /= /leq_trans; apply => //; apply: ltnW.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setU_II
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : `I_m `|` `I_n = `I_(maxn m n).
    Proof.
    by case: leqP => mn; [rewrite setUidr// | rewrite setUidl//]
       => k /= /leq_trans; apply => //; apply: ltnW.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    Iiota
    Source code
     (
    n
    Source code
     : nat) : [set` iota 0 n] = `I_n.
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => [|] ?; rewrite /= mem_iota add0n. Qed.

    Definition
    ordII

    big_lexi_order : forall {I : Type}, (I -> Type) -> Type big_lexi_order is not universe polymorphic Arguments big_lexi_order {I}%_type_scope T%_function_scope big_lexi_order is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.classical_orders.big_lexi_order Declared in library mathcomp.classical.classical_orders, line 29, characters 11-25

    Source code
     {
    n
    Source code
    } (
    k
    Source code
     : 'I_n) : `I_n := SigSub (@mem_set _ `I_n _ (ltn_ord k)).
    Definition
    IIord

    same_prefix : forall {K : nat -> eqType}, Order.NatOrder.Datatypes_nat__canonical__Order_Preorder -> (forall n : nat, K n) -> (forall n : nat, K n) -> Prop same_prefix is not universe polymorphic Arguments same_prefix {K}%_function_scope n (t1 t2)%_function_scope same_prefix is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.classical_orders.same_prefix Declared in library mathcomp.classical.classical_orders, line 36, characters 11-22

    Source code
     {
    n
    Source code
    } (
    k
    Source code
     : `I_n) := Ordinal (set_valP k).

    Definition
    ordIIK

    first_diff : forall {K : nat -> eqType}, (forall n : nat, K n) -> (forall n : nat, K n) -> option nat first_diff is not universe polymorphic Arguments first_diff {K}%_function_scope (t1 t2)%_function_scope first_diff is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.classical_orders.first_diff Declared in library mathcomp.classical.classical_orders, line 60, characters 11-21

    Source code
     {
    n
    Source code
    } : cancel (@ordII n) IIord.
    Proof.
    by move=> k; apply/val_inj. Qed.

    Lemma
    IIordK
    Source code
     {
    n
    Source code
    } : cancel (@IIord n) ordII.
    Proof.
    by move=> k; apply/val_inj. Qed.

    Lemma
    setC_I
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : ~` `I_n = [set
    k
    Source code
     | n <= k].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => [x /negP|x /= nx]; last apply/negP; rewrite -leqNgt.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    mem_not_I
    Source code
    N
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : (n \in ~` `I_N) = (N <= n).
    Proof.
    by rewrite in_setC /mkset /in_mem /mem /= /in_set asboolb -leqNgt. Qed.

    End InitialSegment.

    Lemma
    setT_unit
    Source code
     : [set: unit] = [set tt].
    Proof.
    by apply/seteqP; split => // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_unit
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set unit) : A = set0 \/ A = setT.
    Proof.
    have [->|/set0P[[] Att]] := eqVneq A set0; [by left|right].
    by apply/seteqP; split => [|] [].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setT_bool
    Source code
     : [set: bool] = [set true; false].
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => // [[]] // _; [left|right]. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_bool
    Source code
     (
    B
    Source code
     : set bool) :
      [\/ B == [set true], B == [set false], B == set0 | B == setT].
    Proof.
    have [Bt|Bt] := boolP (true \in B); have [Bf|Bf] := boolP (false \in B).
    - have -> : B = setT by apply/seteqP; split => // -[] _; exact: set_mem.
      by apply/or4P; rewrite eqxx/= !orbT.
    - suff : B = [set true] by move=> ->; apply/or4P; rewrite eqxx.
      apply/seteqP; split => -[]// /mem_set; last by move=> _; exact: set_mem.
      by rewrite (negbTE Bf).
    - suff : B = [set false] by move=> ->; apply/or4P; rewrite eqxx/= orbT.
      apply/seteqP; split => -[]// /mem_set; last by move=> _; exact: set_mem.
      by rewrite (negbTE Bt).
    - suff : B = set0 by move=> ->; apply/or4P; rewrite eqxx/= !orbT.
      by apply/seteqP; split => -[]//=; rewrite 2!notin_setE in Bt, Bf.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    fdisjoint_cset
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType) (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : {fset T}) :
      [disjoint A & B]%fset = [disjoint [set` A] & [set` B]].
    Proof.
    rewrite -fsetI_eq0; apply/idP/idP; apply: contraLR.
    by move=> /set0P[t [tA tB]]; apply/fset0Pn; exists t; rewrite inE; apply/andP.
    by move=> /fset0Pn[t]; rewrite inE => /andP[tA tB]; apply/set0P; exists t.
    Qed.

    Section SetFset.
    Context {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType}.
    Implicit Types (x y : T) (A B : {fset T}).

    Lemma
    set_fset0
    Source code
     : [set
    y
    Source code
     : T | y \in fset0] = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -subset0 => x. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fset1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : [set
    y
    Source code
     | y \in [fset x]%fset] = [set x].
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => y; split; rewrite /= inE => /eqP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetI
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : [set` (A `&` B)%fset] = [set` A] `&` [set` B].
    Proof.
    by rewrite predeqE => x; split; rewrite /= !inE; [case/andP|case=> -> ->].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetIr
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : {pred T}) (
    A
    Source code
     : {fset T}) :
      [set` [fset x |
    x
    Source code
     in A & P x]%fset] = [set` A] `&` [set` P].
    Proof.
    by apply/predeqP => x /=; split; rewrite 2!inE/= => /andP. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetU
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     :
      [set` (A `|` B)%fset] = [set` A] `|` [set` B].
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => x; split; rewrite /= !inE.
      by case/orP; [left|right].
    by move=> []->; rewrite ?orbT.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetU1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : [set
    y
    Source code
     | y \in (x |` A)%fset] = x |` [set` A].
    Proof.
    by rewrite set_fsetU set_fset1. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetD
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     :
      [set` (A `\` B)%fset] = [set` A] `\` [set` B].
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => x; split; rewrite /= !inE; last by move=> [-> /negP ->].
    by case/andP => /negP xNB xA.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    set_fsetD1
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : [set
    y
    Source code
     | y \in (A `\ x)%fset] = [set` A] `\ x.
    Proof.
    by rewrite set_fsetD set_fset1. Qed.

    Lemma
    set_imfset
    Source code
     (
    key
    Source code
     : unit) [
    K
    Source code
     : choiceType] (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> K) (
    p
    Source code
     : finmempred T) :
      [set` imfset key f p] = f @` [set` p].
    Proof.
    apply/predeqP => x; split=> [/imfsetP[i ip -> /=]|]; first by exists i.
    by move=> [i ip <-]; apply: in_imfset.
    Qed.

    End SetFset.

    Section base_image_lemmas.
    Context {
    aT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Implicit Types (A B : set aT) (f : aT -> rT) (Y : set rT).

    Lemma
    imageP
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : A a -> (f @` A) (f a)
    Proof.
    by exists a. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_f
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : a \in A -> f a \in [set f x |
    x
    Source code
     in A].
    Proof.
    by rewrite !inE; apply/imageP. Qed.

    Lemma
    imageT
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : aT -> rT) (
    a
    Source code
     : aT) : range f (f a).
    Proof.
    by apply: imageP. Qed.

    Lemma
    mem_range
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : f a \in range f.
    Proof.
    by rewrite !inE; apply/imageT. Qed.

    End base_image_lemmas.
    #[global]
    Hint Extern 0 ((?f @` _) (?f _)) => solve [apply: imageP; assumption] : core.
    #[global] Hint Extern 0 ((?f @` setT) _) => solve [apply: imageT] : core.

    Section image_lemmas.
    Context {
    aT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Implicit Types (A B : set aT) (f : aT -> rT) (Y : set rT).

    Lemma
    image_inj
    Source code
     {
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    } : injective f -> (f @` A) (f a) = A a.
    Proof.
    by move=> f_inj; rewrite propeqE; split => [[b Ab /f_inj <-]|/(imageP f)//].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    mem_image
    Source code
     {
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    } : injective f ->
       (f a \in [set f x |
    x
    Source code
     in A]) = (a \in A).
    Proof.
    by move=> /image_inj finj; apply/idP/idP; rewrite !inE finj. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_id
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : id @` A = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => a; [case=> /= x Ax <-|exists a]. Qed.

    Lemma
    homo_setP
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    Y
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    } :
      {homo f :
    x
    Source code
     / x \in A >-> x \in Y} <-> {homo f :
    x
    Source code
     / A x >-> Y x}.
    Proof.
    by split=> fAY x; have := fAY x; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_subP
    Source code
     {
    A
    Source code
    Y
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    } : f @` A `<=` Y <-> {homo f :
    x
    Source code
     / A x >-> Y x}.
    Proof.
    by split=> fAY x => [Ax|[y + <-]]; apply: fAY=> //; exists x. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_sub
    Source code
     {
    f
    Source code
     : aT -> rT} {
    A
    Source code
     : set aT} {
    B
    Source code
     : set rT} :
      (f @` A `<=` B) = (A `<=` f @^-1` B).
    Proof.
    by apply/propext; rewrite image_subP; split=> AB a /AB. Qed.

    Lemma
    imsub1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : f @` A `<=` [set x] -> forall
    a
    Source code
    , A a -> f a = x.
    Proof.
    by move=> + a Aa; apply; exists a. Qed.

    Lemma
    imsub1P
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : f @` A `<=` [set x] <-> forall
    a
    Source code
    , A a -> f a = x.
    Proof.
    by split=> [/(@imsub1 _)//|+ _ [a Aa <-]]; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_setU
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : f @` (A `|` B) = f @` A `|` f @` B.
    Proof.
    rewrite eqEsubset; split => b.
    - by case=> a [] Ha <-; [left | right]; apply imageP.
    - by case=> -[] a Ha <-; apply imageP; [left | right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    image_set0
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : f @` set0 = set0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => b // -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_set0_set0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    f
    Source code
     : f @` A = set0 -> A = set0.
    Proof.
    move=> fA0; rewrite predeqE => t; split => // At.
    by have : set0 (f t) by rewrite -fA0; exists t.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    image_set1
    Source code
    f
    Source code
    t
    Source code
     : f @` [set t] = [set f t].
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [b [a' -> <-] //|b ->]; exact/imageP. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_set1
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
     : A `<=` [set a] -> A = set0 \/ A = [set a].
    Proof.
    move=> Aa; have [/eqP|/set0P[t At]] := boolP (A == set0); first by left.
    by right; rewrite eqEsubset; split => // ? ->; rewrite -(Aa _ At).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_set2
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    a
    Source code
    b
    Source code
     : A `<=` [set a; b] ->
      [\/ A = set0, A = [set a], A = [set b] | A = [set a; b]].
    Proof.
    have [<-|ab Aab] := pselect (a = b).
      by rewrite setUid => /subset_set1[]->; [apply: Or41|apply: Or42].
    have [|/nonsubset[x [/[dup] /Aab []// -> Ab _]]] := pselect (A `<=` [set a]).
      by move=> /subset_set1[]->; [apply: Or41|apply: Or42].
    have [|/nonsubset[y [/[dup] /Aab []// -> Aa _]]] := pselect (A `<=` [set b]).
      by move=> /subset_set1[]->; [apply: Or41|apply: Or43].
    by apply: Or44; apply/seteqP; split=> // z /= [] ->.
    Qed.

    Definition
    set_system

    start_with : forall {K : nat -> eqType}, Order.NatOrder.Datatypes_nat__canonical__Order_Preorder -> (forall n : nat, K n) -> (forall n : nat, K n) -> forall i : nat, K i start_with is not universe polymorphic Arguments start_with {K}%_function_scope n (t1 t2)%_function_scope i%_nat_scope start_with is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.classical_orders.start_with Declared in library mathcomp.classical.classical_orders, line 184, characters 11-21

     := set (set U).
    Identity Coercion set_system_to_set : set_system >-> set.

    Source code
     := forall
    A
    Source code

    Source code

    Source code

    Source code
    B
    Source code

    End set_systems.

    Lemma
    setI_closed_setT
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) :
      setI_closed F -> setI_closed (F `|` [set setT]).
    Proof.
    move=> IF=> C D [FC|/= ->{C}].
    - by move=> [FD|/= ->{D}]; [left; exact: IF|rewrite setIT; left].
    - by move=> [FD|->{D}]; [rewrite setTI; left|rewrite !setTI; right].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setI_closed_set0
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T) :
      setI_closed F -> setI_closed (F `|` [set set0]).
    Proof.
    move=> IF=> C D [FC|/= ->{C}].
    - by move=> [FD|/= ->{D}]; [left; exact: IF|rewrite setI0; right].
    - by move=> [FD|->{D}]; [rewrite set0I; right|rewrite !set0I; right].
    Qed.

    Source code

    Source code
    Y
    Source code
     : setI_closed X -> setI_closed Y ->
      setI_closed (rectangle X Y).

    by rewrite -setXI; apply: rectangle_setX; [exact: IG|exact: IH].
    Qed.

    Source code

    Source code
    bT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
     : Type} (

    Lemma

    Lemma
    some_setC
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` (~` A) = [set~ None] `\` (some @` A).
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split; first by move=> _ [x nAx <-]; split=> // -[y /[swap]-[->]].
    by move=> [x [_ exAx]|[/(_ erefl)//]]; exists x => // Ax; apply: exAx; exists x.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    some_setT
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } : some @` [set: T] = [set~ None].
    Proof.
    by rewrite -[setT]setCK some_setC setCT some_set0 setD0. Qed.

    Lemma
    some_setI
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` (A `&` B) = some @` A `&` some @` B.
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split; first by move=> _ [x [Ax Bx] <-]; split; exists x.
    by move=> _ [[x + <-] [y By []]] => /[swap]<- Ay; exists y.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    some_setU
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` (A `|` B) = some @` A `|` some @` B.
    Proof.
    by rewrite -[_ `|` _]setCK setCU some_setC some_setI setDIr -!some_setC !setCK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    some_setD
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` (A `\` B) = (some @` A) `\` (some @` B).
    Proof.
    by rewrite some_setI some_setC setIDA setIidl// => _ [? _ <-]. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub_image_some
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` A `<=` some @` B -> A `<=` B.
    Proof.
    by move=> + x Ax => /(_ (Some x))[|y By [<-]]; first by exists x. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub_image_someP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` A `<=` some @` B <-> A `<=` B.
    Proof.
    by split=> [/sub_image_some//|/image_subset]. Qed.

    Lemma
    image_some_inj
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` A = some @` B -> A = B.
    Proof.
    by move=> e; apply/seteqP; split; apply: sub_image_some; rewrite e. Qed.

    Lemma
    some_set_eq0
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
     : set T) : some @` A = set0 <-> A = set0.
    Proof.
    split=> [|->]; last by rewrite some_set0.
    by rewrite -!subset0 => A0 x Ax; apply: (A0 (some x)); exists x.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    some_preimage
    Source code
     {
    aT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
    } (
    f
    Source code
     : aT -> rT) (
    A
    Source code
     : set rT) :
      some @` (f @^-1` A) = omap f @^-1` (some @` A).
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split; first by move=> _ [a Afa <-]; exists (f a).
    by move=> [x|] [a Aa //= [afx]]; exists x; rewrite // -afx.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    some_image
    Source code
     {
    aT
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
    } (
    f
    Source code
     : aT -> rT) (
    A
    Source code
     : set aT) :
      some @` (f @` A) = omap f @` (some @` A).
    Proof.
    by rewrite !image_comp. Qed.

    Lemma
    disj_set_some
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T} :
      [disjoint some @` A & some @` B] = [disjoint A & B].
    Proof.
    by apply/disj_setPS/disj_setPS; rewrite -some_setI -some_set0 sub_image_someP.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    inl_in_set_inr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : A) (
    Y
    Source code
     : set B) :
      inl x \in [set inr y |
    y
    Source code
     in Y] = false.
    Proof.
    by apply/negP; rewrite inE/= => -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    inr_in_set_inl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     (
    y
    Source code
     : B) (
    X
    Source code
     : set A) :
      inr y \in [set inl x |
    x
    Source code
     in X] = false.
    Proof.
    by apply/negP; rewrite inE/= => -[]. Qed.

    Lemma
    inr_in_set_inr
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     (
    y
    Source code
     : B) (
    Y
    Source code
     : set B) :
      inr y \in [set @inr A B y |
    y
    Source code
     in Y] = (y \in Y).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/idP => [/[!inE][/= [x ? [<-]]]|/[!inE]]//; exists y. Qed.

    Lemma
    inl_in_set_inl
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : A) (
    X
    Source code
     : set A) :
      inl x \in [set @inl A B x |
    x
    Source code
     in X] = (x \in X).
    Proof.
    by apply/idP/idP => [/[!inE][/= [y ? [<-]]]|/[!inE]]//; exists x. Qed.

    Section bigop_lemmas.
    Context {
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Implicit Types (A : set T) (i : I) (P : set I) (F G : I -> set T).

    Lemma

    Source code
    i
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : P i -> F i `<=` \bigcup_(
    j
    Source code
     in P) F j.

    by move=> Pi a Fia; exists i. Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    i
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : P i -> \bigcap_(
    j
    Source code
     in P) F j `<=` F i.

    by move=> Pi a /(_ i); apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_bigcup_r
    Source code
    P
    Source code
     : {homo (fun
    x
    Source code
     : I -> set T => \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) x i)
      :
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     / [set F i |
    i
    Source code
     in P] `<=` [set G i |
    i
    Source code
     in P] >-> F `<=` G}.
    Proof.
    move=> F G FG t [i Pi Fit]; have := FG (F i).
    by move=> /(_ (ex_intro2 _ _ _ Pi erefl))[j Pj ji]; exists j => //; rewrite ji.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_bigcap_r
    Source code
    P
    Source code
     : {homo (fun
    x
    Source code
     : I -> set T => \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) x i)
      :
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     / [set F i |
    i
    Source code
     in P] `<=` [set G i |
    i
    Source code
     in P] >-> G `<=` F}.
    Proof.
    by move=> F G FG t Gt i Pi; have [|j Pj <-] := FG (F i); [exists i|apply: Gt].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    eq_bigcupr
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : (forall
    i
    Source code
    , P i -> F i = G i) ->
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) G i.
    Proof.
    by move=> FG; rewrite eqEsubset; split; apply: subset_bigcup_r;
      move=> A [i ? <-]; exists i => //; rewrite FG.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : (forall
    i
    Source code

      \bigcap_(

    i
    Source code
     in P) G i.

      move=> A [i ? <-]; exists i => //; rewrite FG.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setC_bigcup
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : ~` (\bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i) = \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) ~` F i.
    Proof.
    by rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t PFt i Pi ?|t PFt [i Pi ?]];
      [apply PFt; exists i | exact: (PFt _ Pi)].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    setC_bigcap
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : ~` (\bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (F i)) = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) ~` F i.
    Proof.
    apply: setC_inj; rewrite setC_bigcup setCK.
    by apply: eq_bigcapr => ?; rewrite setCK.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    image_bigcup
    Source code
    rT
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> rT) :
      f @` (\bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (F i)) = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) f @` F i.

    apply/seteqP; split=> [_/= [x [i Pi Fix <-]]|]; first by exists i.
    by move=> _ [i Pi [x Fix <-]]; exists x => //; exists i.
    Qed.

    Lemma
