    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : some @` (\bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (F i)) =
      [set~ None] `&` \bigcap_(

     in P) some @` F i.

    apply/seteqP; split.
      by move=> _ [x Fx <-]; split=> // i; exists x => //; apply: Fx.
    by move=> [x|[//=]] [_ Fx]; exists x => //= i /Fx [y ? [<-]].
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i = \bigcup_(
    j
    Source code
     : P) F (val j).

    rewrite predeqE => x; split; last by move=> [[i/= /set_mem Pi] _ Fix]; exists i.
    by move=> [i Pi Fix]; exists (SigSub (mem_set Pi)).
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) (F i `|` G i) =
      (\bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i) `|` (\bigcup_(

    Source code
     in P) G i).
    Proof.
    apply/predeqP => x; split=> [[i Pi [Fix|Gix]]|[[i Pi Fix]|[i Pi Gix]]];
      by [left; exists i|right; exists i|exists i =>//; left|exists i =>//; right].
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code

    by apply: eq_bigcupr => *; rewrite setCI.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : P !=set0 -> \bigcup_(_ in P) A = A.

    A

    Lemma
    setI_bigcupr
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     :
      A `&` \bigcup_(

      by [exists k |split => //; exists k].

    Lemma

    Source code
    F
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    A
    Source code

      \bigcup_(

    Lemma
    setU_bigcapr
    Source code
    F
    Source code

    Source code
    A

     :
      A `|` \bigcap_(

    Lemma
    setU_bigcapl
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     :
      \bigcap_(

    Source code

    Lemma
    bigcup_mkcond
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i = \bigcup_
    i
    Source code
     if i \in P then F i else set0.
    Proof.
    rewrite predeqE => x; split=> [[i Pi Fix]|[i _]].
      by exists i => //; case: ifPn; rewrite (inE, notin_setE).
    by case: ifPn; rewrite (inE, notin_setE) => Pi Fix; exists i.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcup_mkcondr
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P `&` Q) F i = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) if i \in Q then F i else set0.
    Proof.
    rewrite bigcup_mkcond [RHS]bigcup_mkcond; apply: eq_bigcupr => i _.
    by rewrite in_setI; case: (i \in P) (i \in Q) => [] [].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcup_mkcondl
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in P `&` Q) F i = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in Q) if i \in P then F i else set0.
    Proof.
    rewrite bigcup_mkcond [RHS]bigcup_mkcond; apply: eq_bigcupr => i _.
    by rewrite in_setI; case: (i \in P) (i \in Q) => [] [].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcap_mkcond
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    P
    Source code
     :
      \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i = \bigcap_
    i
    Source code
     if i \in P then F i else setT.
    Proof.
    apply: setC_inj; rewrite !setC_bigcap bigcup_mkcond; apply: eq_bigcupr => i _.
    by case: ifP; rewrite ?setCT.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcap_mkcondr
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P `&` Q) F i = \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) if i \in Q then F i else setT.
    Proof.
    rewrite bigcap_mkcond [RHS]bigcap_mkcond; apply: eq_bigcapr => i _.
    by rewrite in_setI; case: (i \in P) (i \in Q) => [] [].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcup_setX_dep
    Source code
     {
    J
    Source code
     : Type} (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> J -> set T)
        (
    P
    Source code
     : set I) (
    Q
    Source code
     : I -> set J) :
      \bigcup_(
    k
    Source code
     in P `*`` Q) F k.1 k.2 = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code

    j
    Source code
     in Q i) F i j.

    by move=> [[/= i j] [Pi Qj] Fijx]; exists i => //; exists j.

    Lemma
    subset_bigcap
    Source code
    P
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : (forall
    i
    Source code
    , P i -> F i `<=` G i) ->
      \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i `<=` \bigcap_(
    i

     in P) G i.

    Lemma
    setD_bigcup
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    I
    Source code
     : eqType) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) (
    P
    Source code
     : set I) (
    j
    Source code
     : I) : P j ->
      F j `\` \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     in [set
    k
    Source code
     | P k /\ k != j]) (F j `\` F i) =
      \bigcap_(
    i
    Source code
     in P) F i.
    Proof.
    move=> Pj; apply/seteqP; split => [t [Fjt UFt] i Pi|t UFt].
      by have [->//|ij] := eqVneq i j; apply: contra_notP UFt => Fit; exists i.
    by split=> [|[k [Pk kj]] [Fjt]]; [|apply]; exact: UFt.
    Qed.

     | i \in X `\ x]%fset) F i.
    Proof.
    by move=> Xx; rewrite (bigcap_setD1 x)// set_fsetD1. Qed.
    Arguments bigcup_fsetD1 {T U} x.

    Section bigcup_seq.

    Lemma
    bigcup_seq_cond
    Source code
     (
    s
    Source code
     : seq T) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> set U) (
    P
    Source code
     : pred T) :
      \bigcup_(
    t
    Source code
     in [set
    x
    Source code
     | (x \in s) && P x]) (f t) =
      \big[setU/set0]_(
    t
    Source code
     <- s | P t) (f t).
    Proof.
    elim: s => [/=|h s ih]; first by rewrite set_nil bigcup_set0 big_nil.
    rewrite big_cons -ih predeqE => u; split=> [[t /andP[]]|].
    - rewrite inE => /orP[/eqP ->{t} -> fhu|ts Pt ftu]; first by left.
      case: ifPn => Ph; first by right; exists t => //; apply/andP; split.
      by exists t => //; apply/andP; split.
    - case: ifPn => [Ph [fhu|[t /andP[ts Pt] ftu]]|Ph [t /andP[ts Pt ftu]]].
      + by exists h => //; apply/andP; split => //; rewrite mem_head.
      + by exists t => //; apply/andP; split => //; rewrite inE orbC ts.
      + by exists t => //; apply/andP; split => //; rewrite inE orbC ts.
    Qed.

    Lemma

     (
    s
    Source code
     : seq T) (
    f

     in [set` s]) (f t) = \big[setU/set0]_(
    t

     <- s) (f t).
    Proof.
    rewrite -(bigcup_seq_cond s f xpredT); congr (\bigcup_(
    t
    Source code
     in mkset _) _).
    by rewrite funeqE => t; rewrite andbT.
    Qed.

    F
    Source code

     < n) F i = \big[setU/set0]_(

     < n) F i.

    by apply: eq_bigcupl; split=> i; rewrite /= mem_index_iota leq0n.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcup_
    k
    Source code
     \big[setU/set0]_(

    k
    Source code
     in S @` setT) \big[setU/set0]_(
    i

     < k) F i).

    Source code
    n
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     :
      \bigcup_
    i
    Source code
     F i = \big[setU/set0]_(

    Lemma

    Source code
    F

     :
      {homo (fun

    Lemma
    bigcup_addn
    Source code
    F
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     : \bigcup_
    i
    Source code
     F (n + i) = \bigcup_(
    i
    Source code
     >= n) F i.

    rewrite eqEsubset; split => [x /= [m _ Fmnx]|x /= [m nm Fmx]].
    - by exists (n + m) => //=; rewrite leq_addr.
    - by exists (m - n) => //; rewrite subnKC.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    F

    n
    Source code
     : \bigcap_
    i
    Source code

    i
    Source code
     >= n) F i.

    - by rewrite -(subnKC nm); exact: Fnx.
    - exact/nFx/leq_addr.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    bigcup_pred
    Source code
     [
    T

     : finType] [

     : Type] (
    P
    Source code
     : {pred T}) (
    f
    Source code
     : T -> set U) :

     in [set` P]) f t = \big[setU/set0]_(
    t

     in P) f t.

    move=> /mem_set; rewrite (@big_morph _ _ (fun
    X

     => u \in X) false orb).

    - by rewrite in_set0.

    Source code
     (

     : set T) := \bigcap_(

    M

    Lemma
    smallest_sub
    Source code
    G
    Source code
    X
    Source code
     : C X -> G `<=` X -> smallest G `<=` X.
    Proof.
    by move=> XC GX A; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    smallest_sub_sub
    Source code
    G
    Source code
    X
    Source code
     : smallest G `<=` X -> G `<=` X.
    Proof.
    by apply: subset_trans => t Gt B [CB]; exact. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub_smallest
    Source code
    G
    Source code
    X
    Source code
     : X `<=` G -> X `<=` smallest G.
    Proof.
    by move=> XG A /XG GA Y /= [PY]; exact. Qed.

    Lemma
    sub_gen_smallest
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : G `<=` smallest G
    Proof.
    exact: sub_smallest. Qed.

    Lemma
    smallest_id
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : C G -> smallest G = G.
    Proof.
    by move=> Cs; apply/seteqP; split; [exact: smallest_sub|exact: sub_smallest].
    Qed.

    End smallest.
    #[global] Hint Resolve sub_gen_smallest : core.

    Lemma
    smallest_sub_iff
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    C
    Source code
     : set T -> Prop) (
    X
    Source code
    Y
    Source code
     : set T) :
      C Y -> smallest C X `<=` Y <-> X `<=` Y.
    Proof.
    by move=> CY; split; [exact: smallest_sub_sub|exact: smallest_sub].
    Qed.

    Source code

    Definition
    xget

     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) : T :=
      if pselect (exists
    x
    Source code
     : T, `[<P x>]) isn't left exP then x0
      else projT1 (sigW exP).

    CoInductive
    xget_spec
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType}
    x0
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) : T -> Prop -> Type :=

    XGetSome
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     of x = xget x0 P & P x : xget_spec x0 P x True
    |
    XGetNone
    Source code
     of (forall
    x
    Source code
    , ~ P x) : xget_spec x0 P x0 False.

    Lemma
    xgetP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : choiceType}
    x0
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) :
      xget_spec x0 P (xget x0 P) (P (xget x0 P)).
    Proof.
    move: (erefl (xget x0 P)); set y := {2}(xget x0 P).
    rewrite /xget; case: pselect => /= [?|neqP _].
      by case: sigW => x /= /asboolP Px; rewrite [P x]propT //; constructor.
    suff NP x : ~ P x by rewrite [P x0]propF //; constructor.
    by apply: contra_not neqP => Px; exists x; apply/asboolP.
    Qed.

     : set T) (

      (forall
    u
    Source code
     : {
    x
    Source code
     | x \in A}, P u) =
      (forall
    u
    Source code
     : T, forall (
    a
    Source code
     : A u), P (exist _ u (mem_set a))).
    Proof.
    rewrite propeqE; split=> [+ u a|PA [u a]]; first exact.
    have Au : A u by rewrite inE in a.
    by rewrite (Prop_irrelevance a (mem_set Au)); apply: PA.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    in_setP
    Source code
     {
    U
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
     : set U) (
    P
    Source code
     : U -> Prop) :
      {in A, forall
    x
    Source code
    , P x} <-> forall
    x
    Source code
    , A x -> P x.
    Proof.
    by split=> AP x; have := AP x; rewrite inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in_set2P
    Source code
     {
    U
    Source code
    V
    Source code
    } (
    A
    Source code
     : set U) (
    B
    Source code
     : set V) (
    P
    Source code
     : U -> V -> Prop) :
      {in A & B, forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , P x y} <-> (forall
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
    , A x -> B y -> P x y).
    Proof.
    by split=> AP x y; have := AP x y; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in1TT
    Source code
     [
    T1
    Source code
    ] [
    P1
    Source code
     : T1 -> Prop] :
      {in [set: T1], forall
    x
    Source code
     : T1, P1 x : Prop} -> forall
    x
    Source code
     : T1, P1 x : Prop.
    Proof.
    by move=> + *; apply; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    in2TT
    Source code
     [
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
    ] [
    P2
    Source code
     : T1 -> T2 -> Prop] :
      {in [set: T1] & [set: T2], forall (
    x
    Source code
     : T1) (
    y
    Source code
     : T2), P2 x y : Prop} ->
      forall (
    x
    Source code
     : T1) (
    y
    Source code
     : T2), P2 x y : Prop.
    Proof.
    by move=> + *; apply; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Source code
     [
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
    T3
    Source code
    ] [
    P3
    Source code
     : T1 -> T2 -> T3 -> Prop] :
      {in [set: T1] & [set: T2] & [set: T3], forall (
    x
    Source code
     : T1) (
    y
    Source code
     : T2) (
    z
    Source code
     : T3), P3 x y z : Prop} ->
      forall (
    x
    Source code
     : T1) (
    y
    Source code
     : T2) (
    z
    Source code
     : T3), P3 x y z : Prop.
    Proof.
    by move=> + *; apply; rewrite !inE. Qed.

    Lemma
    inTT_bij
    Source code
     [
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     : Type] [
    f
    Source code
     : T1 -> T2] :
      {in [set: T1], bijective f} -> bijective f.
    Proof.
    by case=> [g /in1TT + /in1TT +]; exists g. Qed.

     of isPointed T & Choice T}.

    Source code

    ) (

    Source code
    :

    T

     -> pointedType) :=
      isPointed.Build (forall
    t
    Source code
     : T, T' t) (fun=> point).

    Source code
    .

    _

     (

    ) :=
      isPointed.Build (T * T')%type (point, point).
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition

     (
    n
    Source code
    :
    Source code
    nat
    Source code
    ) (T : pointedType) :=
      isPointed.Build (n.-tuple T) (nseq n point).
    HB
    Source code
    .
    instance
    Source code
    Definition
    Source code
    _
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     (

    Source code
    :
    Source code
    pointedType

    ) :=
      isPointed.Build 'M[T]_(m, n) (\matrix_(_, _) point)%R.

    Source code

    .

    Notation
    get
    Source code
     := (xget point).
    Notation
    "[ 'get' x | E ]"
    Source code
     := (get [set
    x
    Source code
     | E])
      (at level 0, x name, format "[ 'get' x | E ]", only printing) : form_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'get' x : T | E ]"
    Source code
     := (get (fun
    x
    Source code
     : T => E))
      (at level 0, x name, format "[ 'get' x : T | E ]", only parsing) : form_scope.
    Notation
    "[ 'get' x | E ]"
    Source code
     := (get (fun
    x
    Source code
     => E))
      (at level 0, x name, format "[ 'get' x | E ]") : form_scope.

    Section PointedTheory.
    Context {
    T
    Source code
     : pointedType}.

    Lemma
    getPex
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) : (exists
    x
    Source code
    , P x) -> P (get P).
    Proof.
    exact: (xgetPex point). Qed.

    Lemma
    getI
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) (
    x
    Source code
     : T): P x -> P (get P).
    Proof.
    exact: (xgetI point). Qed.

    Lemma
    get_subset1
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : P x -> is_subset1 P -> get P = x.
    Proof.
    exact: (xget_subset1 point). Qed.

    Lemma
    get_unique
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) (
    x
    Source code
     : T) :
       P x -> (forall
    y
    Source code
    , P y -> y = x) -> get P = x.
    Proof.
    exact: (xget_unique point). Qed.

    Lemma
    getPN
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : set T) : (forall
    x
    Source code
    , ~ P x) -> get P = point.
    Proof.
    exact: (xgetPN point). Qed.

    Lemma
    setT0
    Source code
     : setT != set0 :> set T.
    Proof.
    by apply/eqP => /seteqP[] /(_ point) /(_ Logic.I). Qed.

    End PointedTheory.

     X := {

      one : X;
      zero_one_neq : zero != one;
    }.

     of Choice X & isBiPointed X }.

    Variant
    squashed
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     : Prop :=
    squash
    Source code
     (
    x
    Source code
     : T).
    Arguments squash {T} x.
    Notation
    "$| T |"
    Source code
     := (squashed T) : form_scope.
    Tactic Notation "squash" uconstr(x) := (exists; refine x) ||
       match goal with |- $| ?T | => exists; refine [the T of x] end.

    Definition
    unsquash
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } (
    s
    Source code
     : $|T|) : T :=
      projT1 (cid (let: squash x := s in @ex_intro T _ x isT)).
    Lemma
    unsquashK
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } : cancel (@unsquash T) squash
    Proof.
    by move=> []. Qed.

    T

     -> False
    }.

     : T -> nat := fun=> 0%N.

     : nat -> option T := fun=> None.

    Source code
     : pcancel pickle unpickle.
    Proof.
    by move=> x; case: (axiom x). Qed.

    Definition
    find
    Source code
     & pred T & nat : option T := None.

    findP
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : pred T) (
    n
    Source code
     : nat) (
    x
    Source code
     : T) : find P n = Some x -> P x.
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.
    Lemma
    ex_find
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
     : pred T) : (exists
    x
    Source code
     : T, P x) -> exists
    n
    Source code
     : nat, find P n.
    Proof.
    by move=> [/[dup]/axiom]. Qed.

    eq_find
    Source code
     (
    P
    Source code
    Q
    Source code
     : pred T) : P =1 Q -> find P =1 find Q.
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Definition
    no
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : emptyType} : T -> False := @axiom T.
    Definition
    any
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : emptyType} {
    U
    Source code
    } : T -> U := @False_rect _ \o no.

    Lemma
    empty_eq0
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : emptyType} : all_equal_to (set0 : set T).
    Proof.
    by move=> X; apply/setF_eq0/no. Qed.

    Definition
    quasi_canonical_of
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     (
    sort
    Source code
     : C -> T) (
    alt
    Source code
     : emptyType -> T):=
        forall (
    G
    Source code
     : T -> Type), (forall
    s
    Source code
     : emptyType, G (alt s)) -> (forall
    x
    Source code
    , G (sort x)) ->
      forall
    x
    Source code
    , G x.
    Notation
    quasi_canonical_
    Source code
     sort alt := (@quasi_canonical_of _ _ sort alt).
    Notation
    quasi_canonical
    Source code
     T C := (@quasi_canonical_of T C id id).

    Lemma
    qcanon
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    C
    Source code
     (
    sort
    Source code
     : C -> T) (
    alt
    Source code
     : emptyType -> T) :
        (forall
    x
    Source code
    , (exists
    y
    Source code
     : emptyType, alt y = x) + (exists
    y
    Source code
    , sort y = x)) ->
      quasi_canonical_ sort alt.
    Proof.
    by move=> + G Cx Gs x => /(_ x)[/cid[y <-]|/cid[y <-]]. Qed.
    Arguments qcanon {T C sort alt} x.

    Lemma
    choicePpointed
    Source code
     : quasi_canonical choiceType pointedType.
    Proof.
    apply: qcanon => -[Ts [Tc Te]].
    set T := Choice.Pack _.
    have [/unsquash x|/(_ (squash _)) TF] := pselect $|T|.
      right.
      pose Tp := isPointed.Build T x.
      pose TT : pointedType := HB.pack T Te Tc Tp.
      by exists TT.
    left.
    pose TMixin := Choice_isEmpty.Build T TF.
    pose TT : emptyType := HB.pack T Te Tc TMixin.
    by exists TT.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    eqPpointed
    Source code
     : quasi_canonical eqType pointedType.
    Proof.
    by apply: qcanon; elim/eqPchoice; elim/choicePpointed => [[T F]|T];
       [left; exists (Empty.Pack F) | right; exists T].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    Ppointed
    Source code
     : quasi_canonical Type pointedType.
    Proof.
    by apply: qcanon; elim/Peq; elim/eqPpointed => [[T F]|T];
       [left; exists (Empty.Pack F) | right; exists T].
    Qed.

    Section partitions.

    Definition
    trivIset
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :=
      forall
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
     : I, D i -> D j -> F i `&` F j !=set0 -> i = j.

    Lemma
    trivIset1
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    i
    Source code
     : I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) : trivIset [set i] F.
    Proof.
    by move=> j k <- <-. Qed.

    Lemma
    ltn_trivIset
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : nat -> set T) :
      (forall
    n
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    , (m < n)%N -> F m `&` F n = set0) -> trivIset setT F.
    Proof.
    move=> h m n _ _ [t [mt nt]]; apply/eqP/negPn/negP.
    by rewrite neq_ltn => /orP[] /h; apply/eqP/set0P; exists t.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetC_trivIset
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : nat -> set T) :
      (forall
    n
    Source code
    , F n.+1 `<=` ~` (\big[setU/set0]_(
    i
    Source code
     < n.+1) F i)) -> trivIset setT F.
    Proof.
    move=> sF; apply: ltn_trivIset => n m h; rewrite setIC; apply/disjoints_subset.
    by case: n h => // n h; apply: (subset_trans (sF n)); exact/subsetC/bigsetU_sup.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_mkcond
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      trivIset D F <-> trivIset setT (fun
    i
    Source code
     => if i \in D then F i else set0).
    Proof.
    split=> [tA i j _ _|tA i j Di Dj]; last first.
      by have := tA i j Logic.I Logic.I; rewrite !mem_set.
    case: ifPn => iD; last by rewrite set0I => -[].
    by case: ifPn => [jD /tA|jD]; [apply; exact: set_mem|rewrite setI0 => -[]].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_set0
    Source code
     {
    I
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    } (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) : trivIset D (fun=> set0 : set T).
    Proof.
    by move=> i j Di Dj; rewrite setI0 => /set0P; rewrite eqxx. Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIsetP
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
    } {
    I
    Source code
     : eqType} {
    D
    Source code
     : set I} {
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T} :
      trivIset D F <->
      forall
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
     : I, D i -> D j -> i != j -> F i `&` F j = set0.
    Proof.
    split=> tDF i j Di Dj; first by apply: contraNeq => /set0P/tDF->.
    by move=> /set0P; apply: contraNeq => /tDF->.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_bigsetUI
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
     : {pred nat}) (
    F
    Source code
     : nat -> set T) : trivIset D F ->
      forall
    n
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    , D m -> n <= m -> \big[setU/set0]_(
    i
    Source code
     < n | D i) F i `&` F m = set0.
    Proof.
    move=> /trivIsetP tA; elim => [|n IHn] m Dm.
      by move=> _; rewrite big_ord0 set0I.
    move=> lt_nm; rewrite big_mkcond/= big_ord_recr -big_mkcond/=.
    rewrite setIUl IHn 1?ltnW// set0U.
    by case: ifPn => [Dn|NDn]; rewrite ?set0I// tA// ltn_eqF.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_setIl
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     : Type) (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) (
    G
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      trivIset D F -> trivIset D (fun
    i
    Source code
     => G i `&` F i).
    Proof.
    by move=> tF i j Di Dj [x [[Gix Fix] [Gjx Fjx]]]; apply tF => //; exists x.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_setIr
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     : Type) (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) (
    G
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      trivIset D F -> trivIset D (fun
    i
    Source code
     => F i `&` G i).
    Proof.
    by move=> tF i j Di Dj [x [[Fix Gix] [Fjx Gjx]]]; apply tF => //; exists x.
    Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    I

    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
    D'

     : set I) (
    F

     : I -> set T) :
      D `<=` D' -> trivIset D' F -> trivIset D F.

    Lemma
    trivIset_bigcup2
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set T) :
      (A `&` B = set0) = trivIset setT (bigcup2 A B).
    Proof.
    apply/propext; split=> [AB0|/trivIsetP/(_ 0 1 Logic.I Logic.I erefl)//].
    apply/trivIsetP => -[/=|]; rewrite /bigcup2 /=.
    - by move=> [//|[_ _ _ //|j _ _ _]]; rewrite setI0.
    - move=> [[j _ _|]|i j _ _ _]; [by rewrite setIC| |by rewrite set0I].
      by move=> [//|j _ _ _]; rewrite setI0.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_image
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    I'
    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    f
    Source code
     : I -> I') (
    F
    Source code
     : I' -> set T) :
      trivIset D (F \o f) -> trivIset (f @` D) F.
    Proof.
    by move=> trivF i j [{}i Di <-] [{}j Dj <-] Ffij; congr (f _); apply: trivF.
    Qed.
    Arguments trivIset_image {T I I'} D f F.

    Lemma

    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    I'
    Source code
     (
    D
    Source code
     : set I) (
    f
    Source code
     : I -> I') (
    F
    Source code
     : I' -> set T) :
        {in D &, injective f} ->
      trivIset D (F \o f) = trivIset (f @` D) F.
    Proof.
    move=> finj; apply/propext; split; first exact: trivIset_image.
    move=> trivF i j Di Dj Ffij; apply: finj; rewrite ?in_setE//.
    by apply: trivF => //=; [exists i| exists j].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_bigcup
    Source code
     (
    I
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    J
    Source code
     : eqType) (
    D
    Source code
     : J -> set I) (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      (forall
    n
    Source code
    , trivIset (D n) F) ->
      (forall
    n
    Source code
    m
    Source code
    i
    Source code
    j
    Source code
    , n != m -> D n i -> D m j -> F i `&` F j !=set0 -> i = j) ->
      trivIset (\bigcup_
    k
    Source code
     D k) F.
    Proof.
    move=> tB H; move=> i j [n _ Dni] [m _ Dmi] ij.
    have [nm|nm] := eqVneq n m; first by apply: (tB m) => //; rewrite -nm.
    exact: (H _ _ _ _ nm).
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIsetT_bigcup
    Source code
    T1
    Source code
    T2
    Source code
     (
    I
    Source code
     : eqType) (
    D
    Source code

    F
    Source code

     D i) F ->

     in D i) F t).

    move=> D0 h i j _ _ [t [[m Dim Fmt] [n Djn Fnt]]].
    have mn : m = n by apply: h => //; [exists i|exists j|exists t].
    rewrite {}mn {m} in Dim Fmt *.
    by apply: D0 => //; exists n.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    cover_restr
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    D'
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      D `<=` D' -> (forall
    i
    Source code
    , D' i -> ~ D i -> F i = set0) ->
      cover D F = cover D' F.
    Proof.
    move=> DD' D'DF; rewrite /cover eqEsubset; split=> [r [i Di Fit]|r [i D'i Fit]].
    - by have [D'i|] := pselect (D' i); [exists i | have := DD' _ Di].
    - by have [Di|Di] := pselect (D i); [exists i | move: Fit; rewrite (D'DF i)].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    eqcover_r
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      [set F i |
    i
    Source code
     in D] = [set G i |
    i
    Source code
     in D] ->
      cover D F = cover D G.
    Proof.
    move=> FG.
    rewrite eqEsubset; split => [t [i Di Fit]|t [i Di Git]].
      have [j Dj GF] : [set G i |
    i
    Source code
     in D] (F i) by rewrite -FG /mkset; exists i.
      by exists j => //; rewrite GF.
    have [j Dj GF] : [set F i |
    i
    Source code
     in D] (G i) by rewrite FG /mkset; exists i.
    by exists j => //; rewrite GF.
    Qed.

    Notation
    trivIsets
    Source code
     X := (trivIset X id).

    Lemma
    trivIset_sets
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :

    Lemma
    trivIset_widen
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
    D'
    Source code
    D
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) :
      D `<=` D' -> (forall
    i
    Source code
    , D' i -> ~ D i -> F i = set0) ->
      trivIset D F = trivIset D' F.
    Proof.
    move=> DD' DD'F.
    rewrite propeqE; split=> [DF i j D'i D'j FiFj0|D'F i j Di Dj FiFj0].
      have [Di|Di] := pselect (D i); last first.
        by move: FiFj0; rewrite (DD'F i) // set0I => /set0P; rewrite eqxx.
      have [Dj|Dj] := pselect (D j).
      - exact: DF.
      - by move: FiFj0; rewrite (DD'F j) // setI0 => /set0P; rewrite eqxx.
    by apply D'F => //; apply DD'.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    perm_eq_trivIset
    Source code
     {
    T
    Source code
     : eqType} (
    s1
    Source code
    s2
    Source code
     : seq (set T)) (
    D
    Source code
     : set nat) :
      [set
    k
    Source code
     | (k < size s1)] `<=` D -> perm_eq s1 s2 ->
      trivIset D (fun
    i
    Source code
     => nth set0 s1 i) -> trivIset D (fun
    i
    Source code
     => nth set0 s2 i).
    Proof.
    move=> s1D; rewrite perm_sym => /(perm_iotaP set0)[s ss1 s12] /trivIsetP ts1.
    apply/trivIsetP => i j Di Dj ij.
    rewrite {}s12 {s2}; have [si|si] := ltnP i (size s); last first.
      by rewrite (nth_default set0) ?size_map// set0I.
    rewrite (nth_map O) //; have [sj|sj] := ltnP j (size s); last first.
      by rewrite setIC (nth_default set0) ?size_map// set0I.
    have nth_mem k : k < size s -> nth O s k \in iota 0 (size s1).
      by move=> ?; rewrite -(perm_mem ss1) mem_nth.
    rewrite (nth_map O)// ts1 ?(nth_uniq,(perm_uniq ss1),iota_uniq)//; apply/s1D.
    - by have := nth_mem _ si; rewrite mem_iota leq0n add0n.
    - by have := nth_mem _ sj; rewrite mem_iota leq0n add0n.
    Qed.

    End partitions.

    Section Zorn.

    Definition
    total_on

    dfwith : forall {I : eqType} {T : I -> Type}, (forall i : I, T i) -> forall [i : I], T i -> forall j : I, T j dfwith is not universe polymorphic Arguments dfwith {I} {T}%_function_scope f%_function_scope [i] x j dfwith is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.boot.eqtype.dfwith Declared in library mathcomp.boot.eqtype, line 509, characters 11-17

    Source code

     (

    Source code
     : set T) (
    R

     : T -> T -> Prop) :=
      forall

    t

    Let
    total_on_wo_chain
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    R
    Source code
     : rel T) (
    P
    Source code
     : {pred T}) :
      (forall
    A
    Source code
    , total_on A R -> exists
    t
    Source code
    , forall
    s
    Source code
    , A s -> R s t) ->
      wo_chain R P -> exists2
    z
    Source code
    , z \in predT & upper_bound R P z.
    Proof.
    move: R P; elim/Peq : T => T R P Atot RP.
    suff : total_on P R by move=> /Atot[t ARt]; exists t.
    move=> s t Ps Pt; have [| |] := RP [predU (pred1 s) & (pred1 t)].
    - by move=> x; rewrite !inE => /orP[/eqP ->{x}|/eqP ->{x}].
    - by exists s; rewrite !inE eqxx.
    - move=> x [[]]; rewrite !inE => /orP[/eqP ->{x}|/eqP ->{x}].
      + by move=> /(_ t); rewrite !inE eqxx orbT => /(_ isT) Rst _; left.
      + by move=> /(_ s); rewrite !inE eqxx => /(_ isT) Rts _; right.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    Zorn
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    R
    Source code
     : rel T) :
      (forall
    t
    Source code
    , R t t) -> (forall
    r
    Source code
    s
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    , R r s -> R s t -> R r t) ->
      (forall
    s
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    , R s t -> R t s -> s = t) ->
      (forall
    A
    Source code
     : set T, total_on A R -> exists
    t
    Source code
    , forall
    s
    Source code
    , A s -> R s t) ->
      exists
    t
    Source code
    , forall
    s
    Source code
    , R t s -> s = t.
    Proof.
    move: R; elim/Peq : T => T R Rxx Rtrans Ranti Atot.
    have [//| |P _ RP|] := @Zorn's_lemma _ R predT _.
    - by move=> ? ? ? _ _ _; exact: Rtrans.
    - exact: total_on_wo_chain.
    by move=> x _ Rx; exists x => s Rxs; apply: (Ranti _ _ _ Rxs) => //; exact: Rx.
    Qed.

    Definition
    premaximal

     (

     : T -> T -> Prop) (

    Lemma
    ZL_preorder
    Source code
     (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    t0
    Source code
     : T) (
    R
    Source code
     : rel T) :
      (forall
    t
    Source code
    , R t t) -> (forall
    r
    Source code
    s
    Source code
    t
    Source code
    , R r s -> R s t -> R r t) ->
      (forall
    A
    Source code
    , total_on A R -> exists
    t
    Source code
    , forall
    s
    Source code
    , A s -> R s t) ->
      exists
    t
    Source code
    , premaximal R t.
    Proof.
    move: t0 R; elim/Peq : T => T t0 R Rxx Rtrans Atot.
    have [//| | |z _ Hz] := @Zorn's_lemma T R predT.
    - by move=> ? ? ? _ _ _; exact: Rtrans.
    - by move=> A _ RA; exact: total_on_wo_chain.
    by exists z => s Rzs; exact: Hz.
    Qed.

    End Zorn.

    Section Zorn_subset.
    Variables (
    T
    Source code
     : Type) (
    P
    Source code
     : set_system T).

    Lemma
    Zorn_bigcup
    Source code
     :
        (forall
    F
    Source code
     : set_system T, F `<=` P -> total_on F subset ->
          P (\bigcup_(
    X
    Source code
     in F) X)) ->
      exists
    A
    Source code
    , P A /\ forall
    B
    Source code
    , A `<` B -> ~ P B.
    Proof.
    move=> totP; pose R (
    sA
    Source code
    sB
    Source code
     : P) := `[< sval sA `<=` sval sB >].
    have {}totR F (
    FR
    Source code
     : total_on F R) : exists
    sB
    Source code
    , forall
    sA
    Source code
    , F sA -> R sA sB.
       have FP : [set val x |
    x
    Source code
     in F] `<=` P.
         by move=> _ [X FX <-]; apply: set_mem; exact/valP.
       have totF : total_on [set val x |
    x
    Source code
     in F] subset.
         move=> _ _ [X FX <-] [Y FY <-].
         by have [/asboolP|/asboolP] := FR _ _ FX FY; [left|right].
       exists (SigSub (mem_set (totP _ FP totF))) => A FA.
       exact/asboolP/(bigcup_sup (imageP val _)).
    have [| | |sA sAmax] := Zorn _ _ _ totR.
    - by move=> ?; apply/asboolP; exact: subset_refl.
    - by move=> ? ? ? /asboolP ? /asboolP st; apply/asboolP; exact: subset_trans st.
    - by move=> [A PA] [B PB] /asboolP AB /asboolP BA; exact/eq_exist/seteqP.
    - exists (val sA); case: sA => A PA /= in sAmax *; split; first exact: set_mem.
      move=> B AB PB.
      have : R (exist (fun
    x
    Source code
     : T -> Prop => x \in P) A PA) (SigSub (mem_set PB)).
        by apply/asboolP; exact: properW.
      move=> /(sAmax (SigSub (mem_set PB)))[BA].
      by move: AB; rewrite BA; exact: properxx.
    Qed.

    End Zorn_subset.

    Definition
    maximal_disjoint_subcollection
    Source code
    T
    Source code
    I
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
     : I -> set T) (
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : set I) :=
      [/\ A `<=` B, trivIset A F & forall
    C
    Source code
    ,
          A `<` C -> C `<=` B -> ~ trivIset C F ].

    Section maximal_disjoint_subcollection.
    Context {
    I
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     : Type}.
    Variables (
    B
    Source code
     : I -> set T) (
    D
    Source code
     : set I).

    Let
    P
    Source code
     := fun
    X
    Source code
     => X `<=` D /\ trivIset X B.

    Let
    maxP
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set_system I) :
      A `<=` P -> total_on A (fun
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     => x `<=` y) -> P (\bigcup_(
    x
    Source code
     in A) x).
    Proof.
    move=> AP h; split; first by apply: bigcup_sub => E /AP [].
    move=> i j [x Ax] xi [y Ay] yj ij; have [xy|yx] := h _ _ Ax Ay.
    - by apply: (AP _ Ay).2 => //; exact: xy.
    - by apply: (AP _ Ax).2 => //; exact: yx.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    ex_maximal_disjoint_subcollection
    Source code
     :
      {
    E
    Source code
     | maximal_disjoint_subcollection B E D }.
    Proof.
    have /cid[E [[ED tEB] maxE]] := Zorn_bigcup maxP.
    by exists E; split => // F /maxE + FD; exact: contra_not.
    Qed.

    End maximal_disjoint_subcollection.

    Section UpperLowerTheory.
    Import Order.TTheory.
    Variables (
    d

    Definition
    ubound
    Source code

    Source code
     : set T := [set
    y
    Source code
     | forall

     | forall

    Lemma

    Source code
    A
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : (forall
    y
    Source code
    , A y -> (y <= x)%O) <-> ubound A x.
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    lbP
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : (forall
    y
    Source code
    , A y -> (x <= y)%O) <-> lbound A x.
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    ub_set1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : ubound [set x] y = (x <= y)%O.
    Proof.
    by rewrite propeqE; split => [/(_ x erefl)//|xy z ->]. Qed.

    Lemma
    lb_set1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : lbound [set x] y = (x >= y)%O.
    Proof.
    by rewrite propeqE; split => [/(_ x erefl)//|xy z ->]. Qed.

    Lemma
    lb_ub_set1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : lbound (ubound [set x]) y -> (y <= x)%O.
    Proof.
    by move/(_ x); apply; rewrite ub_set1. Qed.

    Lemma
    ub_lb_set1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : ubound (lbound [set x]) y -> (x <= y)%O.
    Proof.
    by move/(_ x); apply; rewrite lb_set1. Qed.

    Lemma
    lb_ub_refl
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : lbound (ubound [set x]) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> y; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    ub_lb_refl
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : ubound (lbound [set x]) x.
    Proof.
    by move=> y; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    ub_lb_ub
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : ubound A y -> lbound (ubound A) x -> (x <= y)%O.
    Proof.
    by move=> Ay; apply. Qed.

    Lemma
    lb_ub_lb
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    x
    Source code
    y
    Source code
     : lbound A y -> ubound (lbound A) x -> (y <= x)%O.
    Proof.
    by move=> Ey; apply. Qed.

    Definition
    down

    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : set T := [set
    x

     | exists

     := A !=set0 /\ has_lbound A.

    Lemma
    has_ub_set1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : has_ubound [set x].
    Proof.
    by exists x; rewrite ub_set1. Qed.

    Lemma
    has_inf0
    Source code
     : ~ has_inf (@set0 T).
    Proof.
    by rewrite /has_inf not_andP; left; exact/nonemptyPn. Qed.

    Lemma
    has_sup0
    Source code
     : ~ has_sup (@set0 T).
    Proof.
    by rewrite /has_sup not_andP; left; exact/nonemptyPn. Qed.

    Lemma
    has_sup1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : has_sup [set x].
    Proof.
    by split; [exists x | exists x => y ->]. Qed.

    Lemma
    has_inf1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : has_inf [set x].
    Proof.
    by split; [exists x | exists x => y ->]. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_has_lbound
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> has_lbound B -> has_lbound A.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB [l Bl]; exists l => a Aa; exact/Bl/AB. Qed.

    Lemma
    subset_has_ubound
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : A `<=` B -> has_ubound B -> has_ubound A.
    Proof.
    by move=> AB [l Bl]; exists l => a Aa; exact/Bl/AB. Qed.

    by split => [[y Ay xy]|[y [Ay xy]]]; [exists y| exists y]. Qed.

    Source code
     := ubound A `&` lbound (ubound A).

    Lemma
    supremums1
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : supremums [set x] = [set x].
    Proof.
    rewrite /supremums predeqE => y; split => [[]|->{y}]; last first.
      by split; [rewrite ub_set1|exact: lb_ub_refl].
    by rewrite ub_set1 => xy /lb_ub_set1 yx; apply/eqP; rewrite eq_le xy yx.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    is_subset1_supremums
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : is_subset1 (supremums A).
    Proof.
    move=> x y [Ax xA] [Ay yA]; apply/eqP.
    by rewrite eq_le (ub_lb_ub Ax yA) (ub_lb_ub Ay xA).
    Qed.

    Definition
    supremum

    image2 : forall {TA TB rT : Type}, set TA -> set TB -> (TA -> TB -> rT) -> set rT image2 is not universe polymorphic Arguments image2 {TA TB rT}%_type_scope (A B)%_classical_set_scope f%_function_scope _ / The reduction tactics unfold image2 when applied to 7 arguments image2 is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.classical_sets.image2 Declared in library mathcomp.classical.classical_sets, line 309, characters 11-17

    Source code
    x0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     := if A == set0 then x0 else xget x0 (supremums A).

    Lemma
    supremum_out
    Source code
    x0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : ~ has_sup A -> supremum x0 A = x0.
    Proof.
    move=> hsA; rewrite /supremum; case: ifPn => // /set0P[/= x Ax].
    case: xgetP => //= _ -> [uA _]; exfalso.
    by apply: hsA; split; [exists x|exists (xget x0 (supremums A))].
    Qed.

    Lemma
    supremum0
    Source code
    x0
    Source code
     : supremum x0 set0 = x0.
    Proof.
    by rewrite /supremum eqxx. Qed.

    Lemma
    supremum1
    Source code
    x0
    Source code
    x
    Source code
     : supremum x0 [set x] = x.
    Proof.
    rewrite /supremum ifF.
      by apply/eqP; rewrite predeqE => /(_ x)[+ _]; apply.
    by rewrite supremums1; case: xgetP => // /(_ x) /(_ erefl).
    Qed.

      by split; [rewrite lb_set1|apply ub_lb_refl].

    Qed.

    Section UpperLowerOrderTheory.
    Import Order.TTheory.
    Variables (
    d
    Source code
     : Order.disp_t) (
    T
    Source code

    Implicit Types (A : set T) (x y z : T).

    Lemma
    ge_supremum_Nmem
    Source code
    x0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    t
    Source code
     :
      supremums A !=set0 -> A t -> (supremum x0 A >= t)%O.
    Proof.
    case=> x Ax; rewrite /supremum; case: ifPn => [/eqP -> //|_].
    by case: xgetP => [y yA [uAy _]|/(_ x) //]; exact: uAy.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    le_infimum_Nmem
    Source code
    x0
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    t
    Source code
     :
      infimums A !=set0 -> A t -> (infimum x0 A <= t)%O.
    Proof.
    case=> x Ex; rewrite /infimum; case: ifPn => [/eqP -> //|_].
    by case: xgetP => [y yE [uEy _]|/(_ x) //]; exact: uEy.
    Qed.

    End UpperLowerOrderTheory.

    Lemma
    nat_supremums_neq0
    Source code
     (
    A
    Source code
     : set nat) : ubound A !=set0 -> supremums A !=set0.
    Proof.
    case => /=; elim => [A0|n ih]; first by exists O.
    case: (pselect (ubound A n)) => [/ih //|An {ih}] An1.
    exists n.+1; split => // m Am; case/existsNP : An => k /not_implyP[Ak /negP].
    rewrite -Order.TotalTheory.ltNge => kn.
    by rewrite (Order.POrderTheory.le_trans _ (Am _ Ak)).
    Qed.

    Section meets.

    Lemma
    meetsC
    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
    G
    Source code
     : set_system T) : F `#` G = G `#` F.
    Proof.
    gen have sFG : F G / F `#` G -> G `#` F.
      by move=> FG B A => /FG; rewrite setIC; apply.
    by rewrite propeqE; split; apply: sFG.
    Qed.

    Source code
    T
    Source code
     (
    F
    Source code
    F'

    T

     (
    F
    Source code

    G'
    Source code
     : set_system T) : G `<=` G' -> F `#` G' -> F `#` G.

    Lemma
    le_def
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : `[< A `<=` B >] = (A `&` B == A).
    Proof.
    by apply/asboolP/eqP; rewrite setIidPl. Qed.

    Lemma
    lt_def
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : `[< A `<` B >] = (B != A) && `[< A `<=` B >].
    Proof.
    apply/idP/idP => [/asboolP|/andP[BA /asboolP AB]]; rewrite properEneq eq_sym;
      by [move=> [] -> /asboolP|apply/asboolP].
    Qed.

    Source code
    B
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `&` (A `|` B) = A.

    by rewrite setUC setKU. Qed.

    meetKU
    Source code
    B
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : A `|` (A `&` B) = A.
    Proof.
    by rewrite setIC setKI. Qed.

    Section exports.

    Lemma
    subsetEset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A <= B)%O = (A `<=` B) :> Prop.
    Proof.
    by rewrite asboolE. Qed.

    Lemma
    properEset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A < B)%O = (A `<` B) :> Prop.
    Proof.
    by rewrite asboolE. Qed.

    Lemma
    subEset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `\` B)%O = (A `\` B)
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    complEset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
     : (~` A)%O = ~` A
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    botEset
    Source code
     : \bot%O = @set0 T
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    topEset
    Source code
     : \top%O = @setT T
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    meetEset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `&` B)%O = (A `&` B)

    by []. Qed.

    Lemma

    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : (A `|` B)%O = (A `|` B)
    Proof.
    by []. Qed.

    Lemma
    subsetPset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : reflect (A `<=` B) (A <= B)%O.
    Proof.
    by apply: (iffP idP); rewrite subsetEset. Qed.

    Lemma
    properPset
    Source code
    A
    Source code
    B
    Source code
     : reflect (A `<` B) (A < B)%O.
    Proof.
    by apply: (iffP idP); rewrite properEset. Qed.

    End SetOrder.
    Export SetOrder.Exports.

    Section seqD.
    Variable
    T

     : Type.
    Implicit Types F : (set T)^nat.

    Definition
    seqDU

    nonempty : forall {T : Type}, {pred T} -> Prop nonempty is not universe polymorphic Arguments nonempty {T}%_type_scope A nonempty is transparent Expands to: Constant mathcomp.classical.wochoice.nonempty Declared in library mathcomp.classical.wochoice, line 41, characters 11-19

    Source code
    F
    Source code
    n
    Source code
     := F n `\` \big[setU/set0]_(
    k
    Source code
     < n) F k.

    Lemma
    trivIset_seqDU
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : trivIset setT (seqDU F).
    Proof.
    move=> i j _ _; wlog ij : i j / (i < j)%N => [/(_ _ _ _) tB|].
      by have [ij /tB->|ij|] := ltngtP i j; rewrite //setIC => /tB ->.
    move=> /set0P; apply: contraNeq => _; apply/eqP.
    rewrite /seqDU 2!setDE !setIA setIC (bigD1 (Ordinal ij)) //=.
    by rewrite setCU setIAC !setIA setICl !set0I.
    Qed.

    Definition
    seqD

    n
    Source code
     => if n isn't n'.+1 then F O else F n `\` F n'.

    Lemma
    seqDU_seqD
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : nondecreasing_seq F -> seqDU F = seqD F.
    Proof.
    move=> ndF; rewrite funeqE => -[|n] /=; first by rewrite /seqDU big_ord0 setD0.
    rewrite /seqDU big_ord_recr /= setUC; congr (_ `\` _); apply/setUidPl.
    by rewrite -bigcup_mkord => + [k /= kn]; exact/subsetPset/ndF/ltnW.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    trivIset_seqD
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : nondecreasing_seq F -> trivIset setT (seqD F).
    Proof.
    by move=> ndF; rewrite -seqDU_seqD //; exact: trivIset_seqDU. Qed.

    Lemma
    eq_bigcup_seqD
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : \bigcup_
    n
    Source code
     seqD F n = \bigcup_
    n
    Source code
     F n.
    Proof.
    apply/seteqP; split => [x []|x []].
      by elim=> [_ /= F0x|n ih _ /= [Fn1x Fnx]]; [exists O | exists n.+1].
    elim=> [_ F0x|n ih _ Fn1x]; first by exists O.
    have [|Fnx] := pselect (F n x); last by exists n.+1.
    by move=> /(ih I)[m _ Fmx]; exists m.
    Qed.

    Lemma
    seqDU_bigcup_eq
    Source code
    F
    Source code
     : \bigcup_
    k
    Source code
     F k = \bigcup_
    k
    Source code
     seqDU F k.

      by rewrite setDE => -[? _]; exists n.
    have [UFnt|UFnt] := pselect ((\big[setU/set0]_(
    k
    Source code
     < n) F k) t); last by exists n.
    suff [m [Fmt FNmt]] : exists
    m
    Source code
    , F m t /\ forall
    k
    Source code
    , (k < m)%N -> ~ F k t.
      by exists m => //; split => //; rewrite -bigcup_mkord => -[k kj]; exact: FNmt.
    move: UFnt; rewrite -bigcup_mkord => -[/= k _ Fkt] {Fnt n}.
    have [n kn] := ubnP k; elim: n => // n ih in t k Fkt kn *.
    case: k => [|k] in Fkt kn *; first by exists O.
    have [?|] := pselect (forall
    m
    Source code
    , (m <= k)%N -> ~ F m t); first by exists k.+1.
    move=> /existsNP[i] /not_implyP[ik] /contrapT Fit; apply: (ih t i) => //.
    by rewrite (leq_ltn_trans ik).
    Qed.

    End seqD.

    Source code

    B
    Source code
    x

    Source code

    Source code

    y
    Source code
